market.note: Special supplement page (The Bonus) - no market data header
Bonus supplement page - no market header

bse_sensex.note: Market holiday - Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections
Economic Survey day - market data from header

articles.headline: Banks in strong position, NPA may drop to 1.9% by March 2027
articles.headline_hindi: बैंकों की स्थिति मजबूत, मार्च 2027 तक घटकर 1.9% पर आ सकता है एनपीए
articles.summary: RBI's Financial Stability Report states that Indian banks' gross NPA ratio fell to 2.1% by September 2025, a multi-decade low. Under normal conditions, it may further decline to 1.9% by March 2027. Banks have adequate capital and liquidity buffers.

articles.headline: Indian economy on path of high growth: RBI Governor
articles.headline_hindi: भारतीय अर्थव्यवस्था उच्च वृद्धि के रास्ते पर
articles.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra wrote in the Financial Stability Report that despite adverse external factors, Indian economy is expected to register high growth on the strength of strong domestic consumption and investment.

articles.headline: Stablecoins pose threat to monetary sovereignty: RBI
articles.headline_hindi: स्टेबलकॉइन मौद्रिक संप्रभुता के लिए खतरा
articles.summary: RBI has warned that widespread use of stablecoins can pose a serious threat to the country's monetary sovereignty and financial stability. Stablecoins are digital currencies pegged to stable assets like the dollar or gold.

articles.headline: AC prices may rise 5-10% as revised star ratings take effect
articles.headline_hindi: जीएसटी दरों में कटौती से खत्म हो सकते हैं उपभोक्ताओं को रूम एसी पर मिलने वाले लाभ
articles.summary: BEE's revised star rating norms effective January 1, 2026 will make new 5-star ACs 10% more energy efficient but also 10% costlier. GST rate cuts on room ACs may be negated by higher star rating costs. Refrigerator prices may rise 3-5%.

articles.headline: Gold and silver prices decline on new year's eve
articles.headline_hindi: सोने और चांदी की कीमतें घटीं
articles.summary: Gold dropped Rs 1,300 to Rs 1,37,700 per 10 grams in Delhi. Silver fell Rs 2,000 to Rs 2,39,000 per kg. Despite the drop, gold gave 73.45% returns in 2025 while silver delivered approximately 164% returns.

articles.headline: Stock market rises 1% on last day of 2025, wealth up by Rs 4.07 lakh crore
articles.headline_hindi: साल के अंतिम दिन एक फीसदी चढ़ा बाजार, 4.07 लाख करोड़ बढ़ी संपत्ति
articles.summary: Sensex rose 545.52 points to close at 85,220.60. Nifty crossed 26,000 to close at 26,129.60. DII buying of Rs 6,759.64 crore helped markets recover. BSE-listed companies' total market cap rose Rs 4.07 lakh crore to Rs 475.79 lakh crore. Sensex gained 9% and Nifty gained 10.5% in 2025.

articles.headline: Small savings scheme interest rates unchanged for Q4
articles.headline_hindi: लघु बचत योजनाओं की ब्याज दरों में बदलाव नहीं
articles.summary: Central government kept interest rates on PPF and other small savings schemes unchanged for the seventh consecutive quarter. Rates effective from January 1 to March 31, 2026.

articles.headline: Hyundai cars to become 0.6% costlier from today
articles.headline_hindi: आज से 0.6 फीसदी महंगी होंगी ह्यूंडई की कारें
articles.summary: Hyundai Motor India announced an average price hike of 0.6% across all models from January 1, citing rising raw material and zinc costs.

articles.headline: Rupee falls 13 paise against dollar to 89.88
articles.headline_hindi: डॉलर के मुकाबले रुपये में 13 पैसे की गिरावट
articles.summary: Rupee depreciated 13 paise to close at 89.88 against the dollar due to foreign investor buying of dollars and capital outflows. Rupee fell 5 paise through the year.

articles.headline: EU carbon tax effective today, setback for Indian exporters
articles.headline_hindi: ईयू का कार्बन कर आज से लागू, भारतीय निर्यातकों के लिए झटका
articles.summary: EU's Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) becomes effective from January 1, 2026, impacting India's aluminium and steel exporters. Indian exporters may need to cut prices by 15-22% to remain competitive. Small exporters may be pushed out of the EU market.

articles.headline: Safeguard duty on steel products is a balanced decision: Nandal Jindal
articles.headline_hindi: स्टील उत्पादों पर ड्यूटी अच्छा फैसला : नंदल जिंदल
articles.summary: Indian Steel Association chairman Naveen Jindal lauded the government's decision to impose safeguard duty on select steel products for three years, with 12% duty in the first year, to protect domestic steel industry from cheap imports.

articles.headline: India's broadband subscribers cross one billion
articles.headline_hindi: भारत में ब्रॉडबैंड सब्सक्राइबर एक अरब पार
articles.summary: India's broadband subscribers crossed 1 billion (100 crore) by November 2025, a sixfold increase from November 2015 levels of 13.15 crore. Average monthly data consumption rose to 24GB per subscriber. Median mobile broadband speed crossed 130 Mbps.

articles.headline: Sugar production up 23.43% in October-December
articles.headline_hindi: अक्तूबर-दिसंबर में 23.43 फीसदी बढ़ा चीनी उत्पादन
articles.summary: India's sugar production rose 23.43% to 1.18 crore tonnes in October-December 2025-26, driven by a surge in Maharashtra's output. UP produced 35.6 lakh tonnes while Maharashtra's output jumped 63% to 48.7 lakh tonnes.

articles.headline: Mutual Fund AUM adds record Rs 14 lakh crore in 2025, SIP plays big role
articles.headline_hindi: म्यूचुअल फंड : एसेट रिकॉर्ड 14 लाख करोड़ बढ़ा, एसआईपी की बड़ी भूमिका
articles.summary: Mutual fund industry added record Rs 14 lakh crore in AUM in 2025, reaching Rs 81 lakh crore by November. SIP investments hit record Rs 3.03 lakh crore. Net investment of Rs 7 lakh crore came through equity schemes. SIP crossed Rs 29,000 crore monthly.

articles.headline: Fiscal deficit reaches 62.3% of budget estimate by November
articles.headline_hindi: राजकोषीय घाटा बढ़कर बजट अनुमान का 62.3 फीसदी पहुंचा
articles.summary: Central fiscal deficit reached Rs 9.76 lakh crore or 62.3% of the annual budget target by November 2025, compared to 52.5% in the same period last year. Total spending was Rs 29.25 lakh crore (57.8% of budget). Total income was Rs 19.49 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Warren Buffett retires as Berkshire Hathaway CEO after 60 years
articles.headline_hindi: वॉरेन बफेट रिटायर : 60 साल बाद एक युग का अंत
articles.summary: Warren Buffett, 95, stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway after 60 years. Greg Abel will take over as CEO from January 1. Berkshire has approximately $400 billion (Rs 35.9 lakh crore) in cash reserves. Buffett will remain as non-executive chairman.

articles.headline: Shyam Dhani Industries IPO lists with 90% premium
articles.headline_hindi: श्याम धनी इंडस्ट्रीज का आईपीओ बढ़त में सूचीबद्ध
articles.summary: Masala manufacturing company Shyam Dhani Industries IPO listed at Rs 133 per equity share on NSE Emerge, a 90% premium over the IPO price band of Rs 65-70.

articles.headline: Record 45.5 lakh passenger vehicles sold in 2025, Hyundai drops to fourth place
articles.headline_hindi: 2025 में रिकॉर्ड 45.5 लाख यात्री वाहन, ह्यूंडई चौथे स्थान पर खिसकी
articles.summary: A record 45.5 lakh passenger vehicles were sold in India in 2025, 6% more than 43.05 lakh in 2024. GST rate cuts from September boosted sales. Maruti remained No. 1 with 18.44 lakh cars. Mahindra and Tata Motors moved to 2nd and 3rd positions, pushing Hyundai to 4th. SUV market share reached 55.8%.

articles.headline: GST revenue rises 6.1% to Rs 1.74 lakh crore in December, domestic collection pace slows
articles.headline_hindi: जीएसटी राजस्व 6.1% बढ़कर 1.74 लाख करोड़
articles.summary: Gross GST collection in December 2025 rose 6.1% YoY to Rs 1,74,550 crore. However, domestic revenue growth slowed after GST rate cuts. Import-related GST surged 19.7% to Rs 51,977 crore. Net GST collection after refunds was Rs 1,45,570 crore. Maharashtra led with Rs 9,852 crore.

articles.headline: Insurance premiums rising due to high-cost distribution strategies: RBI
articles.headline_hindi: बीमा कंपनियों की उच्च लागत रणनीति ने महंगा किया प्रीमियम
articles.summary: RBI has flagged concerns about insurance premiums being driven by high-cost distribution strategies rather than operational efficiency. Life insurance sector's high acquisition costs are a persistent concern. Total premium income was Rs 11.9 lakh crore in 2024-25 vs Rs 8.3 lakh crore in 2020-21.

articles.headline: Tobacco companies required to install CCTV on packaging machines, retain footage for 2 years
articles.headline_hindi: तंबाकू कंपनियों को सीसीटीवी लगाना होगा, फुटेज दो साल तक रखना जरूरी
articles.summary: From February 1, 2026, tobacco, zarda and gutka manufacturers must install CCTV on all pouch-packing machines and retain footage for at least 24 months. GST and capacity-based cess will create a comprehensive tax framework to curb tax evasion.

articles.headline: Tarun Garg takes over as Hyundai Motor India MD & CEO
articles.headline_hindi: ह्यूंडई : तरुण ने संभाला एमडी-सीईओ का पदभार
articles.summary: Tarun Garg became the first Indian to lead Hyundai Motor India as MD & CEO, replacing Unsoo Kim. This is the first time in the company's 29-year history in India that an Indian is heading it.

articles.headline: Rupee falls 10 paise to 89.98 against dollar
articles.headline_hindi: डॉलर के मुकाबले रुपये में 10 पैसे की गिरावट
articles.summary: Rupee weakened 10 paise to 89.98 against the dollar on the first trading day of 2026, pressured by FII outflows and stock market weakness.

articles.headline: Natural gas consumption to grow 3-4% in FY2026-27
articles.headline_hindi: प्राकृतिक गैस की खपत चार फीसदी तक बढ़ेगी
articles.summary: India's natural gas consumption is expected to rise 3-4% in FY2026-27. Industrial demand will drive growth. In the first seven months of 2025-26, gas consumption declined 4.5%.

articles.headline: Coal production up 4.6% in December
articles.headline_hindi: दिसंबर में 4.6 फीसदी बढ़ा कोयला उत्पादन
articles.summary: Coal India's coal production in December 2025 rose 5.2% YoY to 72.4 metric tonnes. However, coal offtake declined to 64.9 MT from 68.5 MT. April-December production fell 2.6%.

articles.headline: UPI transactions hit record high in December
articles.headline_hindi: यूपीआई : लेनदेन रिकॉर्ड उच्च स्तर पर
articles.summary: UPI recorded 21.6 billion transactions in December 2025 worth Rs 28 lakh crore, up 29.3% and 20.3% YoY respectively. Average daily transactions were 69.8 crore. Average ticket size was Rs 1,293. Full year 2025 saw 228.3 billion transactions worth Rs 299.7 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Gold up Rs 640, silver drops Rs 1,600 on first day of new year
articles.headline_hindi: नए साल के पहले दिन महंगा हुआ सोना, चांदी 1,600 रुपये फिसली
articles.summary: Gold rose Rs 640 to Rs 1,38,340 per 10 grams on January 2. Silver fell Rs 1,600 to Rs 2,37,400 per kg. Central bank buying and Gold ETF inflows are supporting gold prices.

articles.headline: Rs 2,000 notes: 98.41% returned to banks
articles.summary: 98.41% of Rs 2,000 denomination notes have been returned to banks. Only Rs 5,669 crore worth notes remain with the public. RBI had announced withdrawal on May 19, 2023.

articles.headline: Electricity consumption up 7% to 138.39 billion units in December
articles.headline_hindi: बिजली खपत 7% बढ़कर 138.39 अरब यूनिट
articles.summary: Electricity consumption in December 2025 rose about 7% to 138.39 billion units, driven by increased use of heaters and geysers during the cold wave in north India.

articles.headline: Banks can now set up own pension funds for NPS management
articles.headline_hindi: एनपीएस प्रबंधन के लिए खुद पेंशन फंड स्थापित कर सकेंगे बैंक
articles.summary: PFRDA approved reforms allowing scheduled commercial banks to set up their own pension funds and manage NPS. Banks managing over $177 billion in assets will now be able to participate more directly, subject to RBI eligibility norms.

articles.headline: BSNL launches WiFi calling service
articles.headline_hindi: बीएसएनएल ने शुरू की नई वाई-फाई कॉलिंग सेवा
articles.summary: BSNL launched Voice over WiFi (VoWiFi) service nationwide on New Year's Day. The free service allows users to make clear voice calls via WiFi in areas with poor network coverage, like basements or remote areas. No separate app required.

articles.headline: IREDA loan disbursement up 44% to Rs 24,903 crore
articles.headline_hindi: इरेडा के कर्ज वितरण में 44 फीसदी की बढ़ोतरी
articles.summary: IREDA's loan disbursement during April-December 2025 rose 44% to Rs 24,903 crore. Sanctioned loans were Rs 40,100 crore, up 29% YoY.

articles.headline: Wheat sowing complete for rabi season, crop conditions better
articles.headline_hindi: रबी सत्र के लिए गेहूं की बुवाई रिपोर्ट पूरी, फसल की स्थिति बेहतर
articles.summary: Wheat sowing for rabi season is nearly complete at 3.23 crore hectares by December 29. Agriculture Commissioner PK Singh said crop conditions are better. Over 73% of sown area used climate-resilient and bio-fortified seeds. Pulses and oilseeds sowing also completed.

articles.headline: India is most optimistic consumer market for new year, spending intent strong
articles.headline_hindi: भारत नए साल में सबसे आशावादी उपभोक्ता बाजार
articles.summary: India is the most optimistic consumer market heading into the new year per Nuvama report. 60% of Indian consumers expect to increase household spending in next 6 months. Net optimism score is 27%, while global average is 12% below zero. China leads followed by India. Cars top the spending priority with 70% planning new car purchases.

articles.headline: Electronic manufacturing: 22 new proposals approved, Rs 41,863 crore investment expected
articles.headline_hindi: इलेक्ट्रॉनिक निर्माण : 22 नए प्रस्ताव मंजूर, 41,863 करोड़ का आएगा निवेश
articles.summary: Government approved 22 new proposals under the Electronic Components Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS), expecting Rs 41,863 crore investment and Rs 2,58,152 crore production value. Expected to create 33,791 jobs. Key companies include Foxconn, Dixon, Samsung, Tata Electronics and Hindalco. Manufacturing covers 11 product categories including PCBs, capacitors, connectors and lithium-ion cells.

articles.headline: Nifty touches new high on second day of new year, Sensex up 573 points
articles.headline_hindi: निफ्टी ने नए साल के दूसरे दिन छुआ नया शिखर, सेंसेक्स 573 अंक उछला
articles.summary: Nifty hit an intraday all-time high of 26,340 on the second trading day of 2026. Sensex surged 573.41 points to 85,762.01. Power, banking and metal stocks led the rally. Total market cap rose Rs 4.32 lakh crore to Rs 481.24 lakh crore. FII bought Rs 289.80 crore, DII bought Rs 677.38 crore.

articles.headline: Textile sector PLI application deadline extended to March 31, 2026
articles.headline_hindi: कपड़ा क्षेत्र की पीएलआई के लिए आवेदन तिथि बढ़ी
articles.summary: Government extended the last date for new applications under the textile sector PLI scheme to March 31, 2026, from the earlier deadline of December 31.

articles.headline: PE investment in real estate up 59% to $6.7 billion in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: रियल एस्टेट में पीई निवेश 59 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: Private equity investment in Indian real estate rose 59% to $6.7 billion in 2025. Foreign institutional capital accounted for 76% of total PE investment. Office segment received the most at $2.4 billion (35.3% of total).

articles.headline: Maruti Suzuki records annual production of 22.55 lakh vehicles in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: मारुति : रिकॉर्ड 22.55 लाख गाड़ियों का उत्पादन
articles.summary: Maruti Suzuki India recorded 22.55 lakh vehicles production in calendar year 2025, up 9.3% YoY. This is the second consecutive year of production exceeding 20 lakh units. Top models were Fronx, Baleno, Swift, Dzire and Ertiga.

articles.headline: Manufacturing PMI drops to 2-year low of 55 in December
articles.headline_hindi: निर्माण क्षेत्र की गतिविधियां दो साल के सबसे निचले स्तर पर
articles.summary: India's HSBC manufacturing PMI fell to 55 in December 2025, the lowest in 2 years, from 56.6 in November. New export orders saw the weakest growth in 14 months. Production growth was the slowest in 38 months. However, price inflation dropped to a 9-month low.

articles.headline: Rupee drops 22 paise to below 90 against dollar
articles.headline_hindi: डॉलर की मजबूत मांग से रुपया 22 पैसे लुढ़का, फिर 90 से नीचे पहुंचा
articles.summary: Rupee fell 22 paise to close at 90.20 against the dollar, breaching the 90 level again. Disappointing macroeconomic data and strong dollar demand from importers weighed on the currency.

articles.headline: Gold up Rs 1,100 and silver up Rs 4,000
articles.summary: Gold rose Rs 1,100 to Rs 1,39,440 per 10 grams. Silver jumped Rs 4,000 to Rs 2,41,400 per kg. Global spot gold traded at $4,392.94 per ounce, up $67.47. Rally driven by US Fed rate cut expectations and positive market outlook.

articles.headline: Forex reserves rise $3.3 billion to $696.61 billion
articles.headline_hindi: विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार में 3.3 अरब डॉलर की बढ़ोतरी
articles.summary: India's forex reserves rose $3.29 billion to $696.61 billion in the week ending December 26, 2025. Foreign currency assets rose $18.4 crore to $559.61 billion. Gold reserves rose $2.95 billion to $113.32 billion.

articles.headline: Rs 7,295 crore export support package announced for exporters
articles.headline_hindi: निर्यातकों के लिए 7,295 करोड़ के पैकेज की घोषणा
articles.summary: Government announced Rs 7,295 crore export support package including Rs 5,181 crore interest subsidy and Rs 2,114 crore credit guarantee support for MSME exporters. Subsidy of up to 2.75% per annum for eligible MSME exporters. Part of the larger Rs 25,060 crore Export Promotion Mission.

articles.headline: Cigarette and tobacco company stocks fall for second consecutive day
articles.headline_hindi: सिगरेट-तंबाकू कंपनियों में दूसरे दिन भी गिरावट
articles.summary: Shares of cigarette and tobacco companies fell for the second consecutive session. ITC dropped 3.79% to Rs 350.15, hitting a 52-week low. Godfrey Phillips fell 1.70%, VST Industries fell 1.49%.

articles.headline: Corporate Ministry orders probe against Shree Cement
articles.headline_hindi: कॉरपोरेट मंत्रालय ने श्री सीमेंट के खिलाफ दिए जांच के आदेश
articles.summary: Ministry of Corporate Affairs ordered an investigation against cement manufacturer Shree Cement and sought information from the Bangur family-promoted company. The probe is under Section 210(1)(c) of the Companies Act 2013.

articles.headline: Industrial loan growth jumps 9.6% in November
articles.headline_hindi: उद्योगों को बैंक से मिलने वाले कजा में 9.6 फीसदी का उछाल
articles.summary: Bank credit to industries rose 9.6% YoY in November 2025, up from 8.3% in November 2024. Non-food bank credit grew 11.4% in the two weeks to November 28. Personal loans grew 12.8%, while home loans and credit card outstanding showed slower growth.

articles.headline: BYD premium car now Rs 50,000 costlier in India
articles.headline_hindi: बीवाईडी की प्रीमियम कार अब 50,000 रुपये महंगी
articles.summary: Chinese EV maker BYD raised the price of its Sealion-7 premium variant by Rs 50,000 in India, effective January 1. New price is Rs 49.4 lakh, up from Rs 48.9 lakh.

articles.headline: Adani Enterprises announces third NCD issue of Rs 1,000 crore
articles.headline_hindi: अदाणी एंटरप्राइजेज ने पेश किया तीसरा निर्गम
articles.summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd announced its third public issue of secured, rated, listed non-convertible debentures (NCD) worth Rs 1,000 crore. The issue opens January 6 and closes January 19, offering up to 8.90% annual returns.

articles.headline: Travel insurance: Essential coverage for new year holiday travelers
articles.headline_hindi: ट्रैवल इंशयोरेंस : फ्लाइट कैंसल हो या सामान खो जाए, आसानी से मिलेगा क्लेम
articles.summary: Advisory article on the importance of travel insurance, covering flight cancellation, medical emergencies, lost luggage, and claim filing procedures. Comprehensive travel insurance policies cover flight delays, baggage loss, and medical emergencies.

articles.headline: Corporate bonds offer better returns than bank FDs for retail investors
articles.headline_hindi: एफडी से बेहतर हैं कॉरपोरेट बॉन्ड
articles.summary: Special feature on corporate bonds as an investment alternative for retail investors. SEBI's 2024 reforms reduced minimum investment from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 10,000. Top corporate bond funds offering 7.37-8.44% returns vs bank FDs at 6.25-7.50%. Bond market opened up for common investors after decades of being restricted to institutions.

articles.headline: EPF withdrawal rules simplified into three categories
articles.headline_hindi: ऑनलाइन ईपीएफ निकासी और आसान
articles.summary: EPFO has simplified its withdrawal rules by reducing 13 categories to just 3: mandatory requirements, housing needs, and special circumstances. Full withdrawal allowed at age 58/retirement, VRS, permanent disability, or emigration. Partial withdrawals for housing (after 5 years), medical emergency, marriage/education (after 7 years).

articles.headline: NPS to include gold-silver and infrastructure investments
articles.headline_hindi: रिटायरमेंट की तिजोरी में चमकेगा सोना-चांदी
articles.summary: NPS is evolving into a modern investment tool. Asset class 'A' will now include gold and silver ETFs and infrastructure investments (REITs and InvITs). Only AIFs with Rs 100 crore+ corpus will be eligible. Municipal bonds with AAA rating also added.

articles.headline: RBI drafts new rules for foreign exchange transactions transparency
articles.headline_hindi: विदेशी लेन-देन में दिखेगा अब पूरा खर्च
articles.summary: RBI has drafted new rules for foreign exchange transactions requiring authorized dealers to show complete cost breakdown before transactions. Banks must display all charges and rates clearly. Rules aim to make retail foreign payments more transparent.

articles.headline: India overtakes China to become world's largest rice producer
articles.headline_hindi: चीन को पीछे छोड़ दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा चावल उत्पादक बना भारत
articles.summary: India's rice production reached 15.18 crore tonnes, surpassing China's 14.5 crore tonnes to become the world's largest rice producer. Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan released 184 new crop varieties across 25 crops. Modi government approved 3,236 high-yield varieties since 2014.

articles.headline: Tata Group begins search for new Air India CEO, Wilson to be replaced
articles.headline_hindi: एअर इंडिया के खराब प्रदर्शन से टाटा समूह ने शुरू की नए सीईओ की तलाश
articles.summary: Tata Group has begun searching for a new CEO for Air India, planning to replace current chief Campbell Wilson before his term ends in 2027. Chairman N Chandrasekaran is reportedly dissatisfied with slow reforms and ground-level progress. Fatal June crash and subsequent safety issues prompted the move.

articles.headline: Gold jewelry demand remains robust despite rising prices, Tamil Nadu leads
articles.headline_hindi: आभूषणों की चमक बरकरार : चमक बिखेरने में तमिलनाडु सबसे आगे, उत्तर भारत पिछड़ा
articles.summary: Despite gold prices rising 10x from 2005-2025, India's gold demand remained at 800-1,000 tonnes annually. Purchase pattern shifted from jewelry (now 60-65%) to gold coins/biscuits (25-30%). 18-carat demand rose in urban markets. Tamil Nadu is the largest gold market followed by Maharashtra and Kerala.

articles.headline: 100 Million Jobs initiative launched by Nasscom and industry leaders
articles.headline_hindi: विशाल आबादी का लाभ उठाने को 10 करोड़ नौकरियों का सृजन जरूरी
articles.summary: Nasscom co-founder Harish Mehta, TiE founder AJ Patel, and CIPP founder K Yatish Rajawat launched the Hundred Million Jobs initiative to create 10 crore jobs in the next decade. India's working population grows 1.2 crore annually. AI could eliminate 2+ lakh banking jobs in 5 years per Morgan Stanley.

articles.headline: Sensex drops 322 points on Trump tariff warnings
articles.headline_hindi: ट्रंप की ताजा चेतावनी से सेंसेक्स 322 अंक लुढ़का
articles.summary: Sensex fell 322.39 points to 85,439.62 and Nifty dropped 78.25 points to 26,250.30 after Trump's fresh tariff threats on Indian products following the Venezuela attack. HDFC Bank was the biggest loser. 15 of 30 Sensex stocks declined. DII bought Rs 1,764.07 crore. Market cap fell to Rs 480.80 lakh crore.

articles.headline: HDFC Bank deposits grow 12% YoY in December quarter
articles.headline_hindi: एचडीएफसी बैंक का जमा 12 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: HDFC Bank's deposits grew 12% YoY to Rs 27.52 lakh crore in December quarter. Loans also grew 12% to Rs 28.44 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Bank of Maharashtra loan growth at 19.61% in Q3
articles.headline_hindi: बैंक ऑफ महाराष्ट्र के ऋण में 20 फीसदी वृद्धि
articles.summary: Bank of Maharashtra's total loans grew 19.61% YoY to Rs 2.73 lakh crore in Q3 FY26. Corporate loans were Rs 1.02 lakh crore and retail/agriculture/MSME loans were Rs 1.71 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Torrent Pharma board approves Rs 12,500 crore fundraise
articles.headline_hindi: टोरंट फार्मा 12,500 करोड़ रुपये जुटाएगी
articles.summary: Torrent Pharma's board approved raising up to Rs 12,500 crore via private placement of NCDs in one or more tranches.

articles.headline: Sundaram Alternates targets Rs 2,000 crore real estate fund by March 2026
articles.headline_hindi: सुंदरम जुटाएगी 2,000 करोड़ रुपये का फंड
articles.summary: Sundaram Alternates plans to raise up to Rs 2,000 crore real estate fund by March 2026. Already raised Rs 1,000 crore in last three months, targeting additional Rs 500-1,000 crore.

articles.headline: Kotak Mahindra launches Dividend Yield Fund
articles.headline_hindi: कोटक महिन्द्रा का डिविडेंड यील्ड फंड लॉन्च
articles.summary: Kotak Mahindra Asset Management launched an open-ended equity scheme - Kotak Dividend Yield Fund - investing in dividend-paying stocks. NFO opens January 5 and closes January 19.

articles.headline: SBI to start rupee-based trade with Israel
articles.headline_hindi: इस्राइल से रुपये में कारोबार शुरू करेगा एसबीआई
articles.summary: State Bank of India is considering facilitating bilateral trade with Israel in rupees. SBI Israel CEO V Manivannan said Israel has been chosen as a partner country. Export/import transactions will be settled through a special rupee vostro account.

articles.headline: Rupee falls for fourth consecutive session, drops 10 paise to 90.30
articles.headline_hindi: रुपये में चौथे सत्र में भी रही गिरावट
articles.summary: Rupee fell 10 paise to 90.30 against the dollar for the fourth consecutive session, losing 55 paise across four sessions. Geopolitical tensions from US military intervention in Venezuela boosted dollar demand. However, falling crude oil prices provided some support.

articles.headline: Silver up Rs 2,600 on strong geopolitical and industrial demand
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी 2,600 रुपये महंगी
articles.summary: Silver rose Rs 2,600 to Rs 2,44,000 per kg. Gold rose Rs 960 to Rs 1,40,400 per 10 grams. Strong global geopolitical tensions and industrial demand supported precious metals. International gold at $4,418.2/oz.

articles.headline: Record rabi sowing at 634 lakh hectares across India
articles.headline_hindi: रिकॉर्ड : रबी सीजन में अब तक 634 लाख हेक्टेयर में बुवाई
articles.summary: Rabi sowing reached a record 634.14 lakh hectares by January 2, up 16.40 lakh hectares from last year. Wheat sowing was 6.3% higher at 334.7 lakh hectares. Paddy sowing rose to 17.57 lakh hectares. Maize set a record at 23.32 lakh hectares. Oilseed sowing at 96.30 lakh hectares.

articles.headline: CES 2026: Samsung, LG and others showcase futuristic tech products
articles.headline_hindi: सीईएस-2026 : अमेरिका के लास-वेगास में तकनीक के सबसे बड़े मेले का आगाज
articles.summary: CES 2026 underway in Las Vegas (Jan 6-9) with Samsung, LG and others showcasing innovative products including Samsung's 130-inch micro RGB TV, Hyundai's humanoid robot Atlas that can change its own battery, world's lightest laptop at 899 grams by MSI, LG's wallpaper OLED TV, and Owl-shaped CCTV camera.

articles.headline: CCI finds 25 steel companies guilty of price-fixing, heavy fines likely
articles.headline_hindi: सीसीआई की जांच...कंपनियों पर स्टील की कीमतें ऊंची बनाए रखने का आरोप
articles.summary: Competition Commission of India found 25 steel companies including JSW Steel, Tata Steel, SAIL and their 56 top officials guilty of collusive price-fixing from 2015-2023. Companies face fines up to 10% of turnover per year of violation. JSW Steel has 17.5% market share, Tata Steel 13.3%, SAIL 10%. Case originated from a 2021 builder complaint about 55% price hike in just 6 months.

articles.headline: Reliance stops buying Russian crude, imports may hit multi-year low in January
articles.headline_hindi: रिलायंस के रूसी तेल नहीं खरीदने से कई वर्षों में सबसे कम रहेगा आयात
articles.summary: Reliance Industries stopped receiving Russian crude oil at its Jamnagar refinery for the past three weeks, potentially pushing January Russian oil imports to a multi-year low. Reliance had stopped using Russian crude at its export-oriented refinery since November 2025 to comply with EU sanctions. India imported 144 billion euros of Russian crude since the Ukraine war began. Trump warned of higher tariffs on India for buying Russian oil.

articles.headline: Sensex falls 376 points for second consecutive day on tariff fears
articles.headline_hindi: बड़ी कंपनियों के शेयरों में बिकवाली से सेंसेक्स 376 अंक टूटा
articles.summary: Sensex fell 376.28 points to 85,063.34 and Nifty dropped 71.60 points to 26,178.70 for the second straight session. Reliance Industries crashed 4.42%, losing nearly Rs 1 lakh crore in market cap - the biggest single-day fall since June 4, 2024. FII sold Rs 10,763 crore while DII bought Rs 1,749.35 crore. BSE market cap fell Rs 1.20 lakh crore to Rs 479.60 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Adani NCD worth Rs 1,000 crore fills up in 45 minutes
articles.headline_hindi: अदाणी का 1,000 करोड़ का बॉन्ड 45 मिनट में भरा
articles.summary: Adani Enterprises' Rs 1,000 crore NCD issue filled up within 45 minutes of opening on Tuesday. The base size of Rs 500 crore was subscribed in just 10 minutes. The issue offers 8.90% interest and runs until January 19.

articles.headline: Silver surges Rs 7,000, gold up Rs 1,100 as fourth consecutive session of gains
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी में 7,000 रुपये का भारी उछाल
articles.summary: Silver jumped Rs 7,000 to Rs 2,51,000 per kg, its third consecutive day of sharp gains. Gold rose Rs 1,100 to Rs 1,41,500 per 10 grams, its fourth straight session of gains. Strong global signals and industrial demand drove the rally. International silver at $31.75/oz.

articles.headline: RBI likely to cut repo rate by 0.50% this year too
articles.headline_hindi: रेपो दर में इस साल भी 0.50% कटौती संभव
articles.summary: RBI has room for another 0.50% repo rate cut in 2026, according to IIFL Capital report. In 2025, rates were cut by 1.25%. The gap between repo rate and retail inflation currently stands at 2.8%, suggesting additional easing room.

articles.headline: Services PMI drops to 11-month low of 58 in December
articles.headline_hindi: सेवा क्षेत्र की वृद्धि दर 11 महीने में सबसे कम
articles.summary: HSBC India services PMI fell to 58 in December 2025 from 59.8 in November, the slowest expansion since January 2025. New business and output growth slowed. Employment growth hit a near 3.5-year low. Companies reported demand from Asia, North America, West Asia and Britain.

articles.headline: FMCG sector volume growth expected to rise 5%, recovery underway
articles.headline_hindi: एफएमसीजी क्षेत्र में उछाल, वॉल्यूम पांच फीसदी बढ़ेगा
articles.summary: FMCG sector volumes expected to grow 5% in coming months, driven by strong economic indicators, low inflation and negative food inflation. Consumer confidence is returning. FMCG posted 5.3% growth in September quarter - the best since April 2024.

articles.headline: Over 2.81 crore vehicles sold in retail in 2025, rural markets outpace urban
articles.headline_hindi: 2025 में बिकीं 2.81 करोड़ से अधिक गाड़ियां, ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों ने शहरों को पीछे छोड़ा
articles.summary: Over 2.81 crore vehicles were sold in retail markets in 2025, up 7.71% YoY. Rural sales grew 12% while urban grew only 8%. Passenger vehicle retail sales rose 9.7% to 44.75 lakh. Two-wheelers grew 7.24% to 2.02 crore. CNG/hybrid vehicles' share rose from 18% to 21%. EV share rose to 4% from 2.4%. GST rate cuts from September transformed the market.

articles.headline: Real estate institutional investment hits record $8.47 billion in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: रियल्टी : संस्थागत निवेश रिकॉर्ड 8.47 अरब डॉलर
articles.summary: Institutional investment in Indian real estate reached a record $8.47 billion in 2025, up 29% from $6.56 billion in 2024. Domestic investment doubled to $4.82 billion. Foreign investment was 16% lower at $3.65 billion.

articles.headline: India GDP growth likely to be 6.9% in FY27: India Ratings
articles.headline_hindi: अगले वित्त वर्ष में 6.9 फीसदी रहेगी वृद्धि दर
articles.summary: India Ratings projects 6.9% GDP growth for FY2026-27. GST and income tax cuts, reforms and trade agreements will drive growth. Retail inflation expected to average 3.8%. A low-tariff India-US trade deal could further boost GDP.

articles.headline: Volkswagen recalls 3.56 lakh vehicles in US over software defect
articles.headline_hindi: फॉक्सवैगन 3.56 लाख कारों को मंगाएगी वापस
articles.summary: Volkswagen is recalling 356,649 vehicles in the US due to a software defect that may affect the rearview camera display. US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration confirmed the recall by Volkswagen and its subsidiary Porsche.

articles.headline: SEBI proposes allowing stock price data for educational purposes with 30-day delay
articles.headline_hindi: शैक्षणिक सामग्री के लिए सूचीबद्ध कंपनियों के डाटा का उपयोग नहीं
articles.summary: SEBI proposed allowing use of listed companies' stock price data for educational purposes with a 30-day delay. The proposal aims to help investor education while protecting market integrity. Comments invited till January 27.

articles.headline: Indian presence growing at world's biggest tech show CES
articles.headline_hindi: दुनिया के सबसे बड़े टेक शो में लगातार बढ़ रही भारतीयों की उपस्थिति
articles.summary: Indian companies and startups are increasingly participating in CES-2026 in Las Vegas. CES Vice President John Kelly said Indian participation will grow further in coming years. Companies from 150 countries including India are showcasing innovations in digital health, energy, robotics, AI and mobility.

articles.headline: India's GDP to grow at fastest pace of 7.4%
articles.headline_hindi: वैश्विक संकट के बाद भी 7.4 फीसदी की सबसे तेज रफ्तार से बढ़ेगी जीडीपी
articles.summary: NSO released first advance estimate of national income showing India's GDP will grow at 7.4% in FY2025-26, higher than RBI and other agencies' estimates. Nominal GDP expected at Rs 357.14 lakh crore. Manufacturing sector to grow at 7% and services at 9.1%.

articles.headline: Silver surges to new record, up Rs 5,000 per kg
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी फिर नए शिखर पर...5,000 रुपये बढ़ी कीमत, सोने में गिरावट
articles.summary: Silver prices surged Rs 5,000 per kg to Rs 2,56,000 in Delhi market on Wednesday, driven by rising US-Venezuela tensions boosting safe-haven demand and strong industrial buying. Gold declined Rs 100 to Rs 1,41,400 per 10g.

articles.headline: JP Morgan and Citi Group exit SBI Funds IPO management
articles.headline_hindi: वॉल एसबीआई फंड्स के आईपीओ से हटे जेपी मॉर्गन और सिटी ग्रुप
articles.summary: Wall Street banks JP Morgan and Citi Group withdrew from managing SBI Funds Management's proposed Rs 13,000 crore IPO due to low fees offered. SBI has appointed Jefferies Financial as replacement. SBI offered only 0.01% of issue size as fee, which bankers considered too low.

articles.headline: Vodafone Idea may lose 35 lakh subscribers
articles.headline_hindi: वोडाफोन आइडिया के घट सकते हैं 35 लाख ग्राहक
articles.summary: Market analysts estimate Vodafone Idea may face a nearly threefold decline in subscriber numbers during the October-December quarter, losing approximately 35 lakh customers despite investing in 4G network and launching 5G services.

articles.headline: SEBI extends incentive period for mutual fund distributors
articles.headline_hindi: फंड वितरकों के लिए प्रोत्साहन अवधि बढ़ी
articles.summary: SEBI extended the deadline for additional incentives to mutual fund distributors for adding new individual investors from B-30 cities and new women investors from any city to March 1, 2026, from the earlier February 1 deadline.

articles.headline: Tata Power to invest Rs 6,675 crore in Nellore
articles.headline_hindi: टाटा पावर 6,675 करोड़ का करेगी निवेश
articles.summary: Tata Power Renewable Energy Ltd will invest Rs 6,675 crore to set up a 10 GW capacity ingot and wafer manufacturing facility in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh. This will be the country's largest ingot and wafer manufacturing facility for advanced solar energy production.

articles.headline: Inox Clean Energy raises Rs 3,100 crore
articles.headline_hindi: आइनॉक्स क्लीन ने 3,100 करोड़ जुटाए
articles.summary: Inox Clean Energy raised Rs 3,100 crore in an equity funding round from domestic and foreign investors, selling approximately 6% stake. The company will use this amount to achieve its target of 10 GW capacity by 2027-28, at a pre-money valuation of Rs 50,000 crore.

articles.headline: Welspun Corp's order book crosses Rs 23,400 crore
articles.headline_hindi: वेलस्पन कॉर्प का ऑर्डर बुक 23,400 करोड़
articles.summary: Welspun Corp's global order book crossed Rs 23,400 crore after securing a new export order for large-diameter coated line pipes for supply in the US. The order will be executed between FY2025-26 and FY2027-28.

articles.headline: Housing sales in top 8 cities drop to 3.48 lakh units
articles.headline_hindi: आठ प्रमुख शहरों में मकानों की बिक्री घटकर 3.48 लाख इकाई
articles.summary: Home sales in top 8 cities fell 1% to 3.48 lakh units last year despite average prices rising 19%. Knight Frank India noted lower home loan rates, strong economic growth, and low inflation helped prevent a bigger decline. Mumbai region saw 1% increase to 97,188 units.

articles.headline: India should diversify silver processing to reduce import dependency
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी का प्रसंस्करण बढ़ाकर आयात में विविधता लाए भारत, खत्म होगी निर्भरता
articles.summary: GTRI said India should focus on domestic refining and recycling to reduce dependence on imported refined silver. India imported $6.4 billion of refined silver in 2024 while exporting only $47.8 million. Total silver imports estimated to reach $9.2 billion in 2025, up 44% from 2024.

articles.headline: EV retail sales cross 22.70 lakh in 2025, up 16%
articles.headline_hindi: ई-वाहनों की खुदरा बिक्री 2025 में 16 फीसदी बढ़कर 22.70 लाख पार
articles.summary: Electric vehicle retail sales grew 16.37% in 2025 to 22,70,107 units driven by 77% surge in electric car sales. E-car sales reached 1,76,817 units vs 99,975 in 2024. FADA Chairman noted India's electrification journey is steadily expanding.

articles.headline: Eternal receives Rs 3.7 crore GST notice
articles.headline_hindi: इटरनल को मिला 3.7 करोड़ का जीएसटी नोटिस
articles.summary: Eternal (formerly Zomato) received a GST demand notice for Rs 3,69,80,242 including interest and penalty for the period April 2019 to March 2020 from West Bengal Additional State Tax Commissioner (Appeals).

articles.headline: Rupee strengthens 31 paise against dollar
articles.headline_hindi: कच्चे तेल के दाम घटने से रुपये में 31 पैसे मजबूती
articles.summary: Indian rupee strengthened 31 paise against the US dollar to close at 89.87, supported by falling crude oil prices and RBI intervention. The rupee opened at 90.20 and traded in the 89.75-90.23 range.

articles.headline: Tech layoffs down 20% in 2025 but still 1.22 lakh affected globally
articles.headline_hindi: एआई पर जोर के बावजूद 2025 में टेक कंपनियों में 20 फीसदी कम छंटनी
articles.summary: Despite focus on AI and robotics, global tech companies laid off about 20% fewer employees in 2025 vs 2024. 257 companies fired 1,22,549 workers (vs 1,52,922 from 551 companies in 2024). Intel led with 22,000 layoffs in two rounds. In India, TCS fired over 12,000.

articles.headline: Markets fall for 4th straight session, Rs 7.7 lakh crore wiped out
articles.headline_hindi: धातु, तेल-गैस और कमोडिटी शेयरों में सबकवाली से बाजार में चार सत्रों से गिरावट जारी
articles.summary: Sensex fell 780.18 points (0.92%) to 84,180.96 and Nifty dropped 263.90 points (1.01%) to 25,876.85 - biggest fall since Aug 26, 2025. Metal, oil-gas and commodity stocks saw heavy selling. FIIs sold Rs 3,367.12 crore. Investors lost Rs 7.68 lakh crore in market cap across four sessions.

articles.headline: Silver crashes Rs 12,500 from record high, gold falls Rs 900
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी रिकॉर्ड ऊंचाई से 12,500 रुपये सस्ती, सोना 900 लुढ़का
articles.summary: Silver prices crashed Rs 12,500 from record levels to Rs 2,43,500/kg in Delhi after global profit-booking. Gold fell Rs 900 to Rs 1,40,500/10g. Internationally, spot gold dropped 0.67% to $4,426.91/oz and silver fell 3.22% to $75.67/oz.

articles.headline: RBI to support tariff-affected exporters with new measures
articles.headline_hindi: टैरिफ प्रभावित निर्यातकों को नए तरीके से समर्थन देगा आरबीआई
articles.summary: RBI is considering new ways to support exporters affected by US tariffs, as few took advantage of existing loan repayment moratorium. The central bank is in talks with export agencies and may ease eligibility criteria or issue concessional-rate loans.

articles.headline: Reliance considering Venezuela oil purchase amid Trump sanctions
articles.headline_hindi: ट्रंप की सख्ती के बीच वेनेजुएला से तेल खरीद की तैयारी में रिलायंस
articles.summary: Reliance Industries, which operates the world's largest refining complex, may purchase Venezuelan oil if non-US buyers are allowed to buy it. This comes amid global energy trade discussions after US began marketing Venezuelan oil internationally.

articles.headline: Eternal receives Rs 27.5 crore GST notice
articles.headline_hindi: इटरनल को 27.5 करोड़ का जीएसटी नोटिस मिला
articles.summary: Eternal received two GST notices totaling Rs 27.56 crore including interest and penalty from West Bengal Additional Commissioner of State Tax (Appeals) for the period April 2020 to March 2022 related to output tax underpayment.

articles.headline: Bajaj Finserv completes Allianz stake acquisition in insurance companies
articles.headline_hindi: बजाज ने आलियांज के हिस्से की खरीद पूरी की
articles.summary: Bajaj Finserv completed acquisition of Germany's Allianz SE's 23% stake in Bajaj General and Bajaj Life Insurance for Rs 12,190 crore and Rs 9,200 crore respectively. This raises Bajaj group's stake from 74% to 97%, giving full control.

articles.headline: SEBI amends stockbroker regulations for ease of compliance
articles.headline_hindi: सेबी ने किया स्टॉक ब्रोकर नियमों में संशोधन
articles.summary: SEBI amended three-decade-old stockbroker rules to allow brokers to operate activities under other financial regulators' frameworks. The move aims to simplify language, ease compliance and make business operations simpler.

articles.headline: Specialty chemical stocks deliver 12% returns in one month
articles.headline_hindi: बाजार की दस्तिरता में स्पेशियलिटी केमिकल शेयरों ने एक माह में दिया 12 फीसदी रिटर्न
articles.summary: Despite market instability, specialty chemical stocks delivered double-digit returns. SRF rose 12% to Rs 3,142, Himadri Speciality Chemical up 11% to Rs 498, Vinati Organics up 7%. Analysts see further potential in the sector driven by lithium-ion battery materials.

articles.headline: APEDA launches initiative for agri-tech startups
articles.headline_hindi: एपीडा ने स्टार्टअप के लिए शुरू की पहल
articles.summary: APEDA launched an initiative to support agri-food and agri-tech startups for exports. Top 10 startups will get opportunities to showcase products at international platforms, aiming to promote innovation and create new export opportunities for young entrepreneurs.

articles.headline: UIDAI launches Uday mascot for Aadhaar services
articles.headline_hindi: यूआईडीएआई ने लॉन्च किया शुभंकर उदय
articles.summary: UIDAI launched a mascot named 'Uday' to make Aadhaar-related communications more user-friendly. The mascot will help explain updates, authentication, offline verification, and new technology usage in simple language.

articles.headline: Heavy tobacco tax will render small retailers unemployed
articles.headline_hindi: तंबाकू पर भारी कर से छोटे दुकानदार हो जाएंगे बेरोजगार
articles.summary: Federation of Retailer Association of India warned that massive tax hikes on tobacco products from Feb 1 will render small shopkeepers unemployed and boost illegal sales. FRAI represents 80 lakh small, medium and large retailers.

articles.headline: Stalled 61,000 homes being completed with SWAMIH fund
articles.headline_hindi: अटके 61,000 घरों का निर्माण स्वामी कोष की सहायता से पूरा
articles.summary: Government's SWAMIH stress fund completed construction of over 61,000 stalled homes across 30 cities by Dec 15. The fund aims to provide relief to 4 lakh+ homebuyers, including 7,000+ EWS and rehabilitation category units. The fund committed its entire investment corpus.

articles.headline: India's markets outperformed globally in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: वैश्विक शेयर बाजारों में भारत ने बाजी मारी...अमेरिका ने बनाई बढ़त, चीन पिछड़ा
articles.summary: India outperformed most global markets in 2025 backed by strong domestic demand, infrastructure investment and stable banking. S&P Global called India the most trusted emerging equity market. China remained weakest due to real estate crisis. US rally was narrow and tech-driven.

articles.headline: 84% Indian professionals feel unprepared for new jobs
articles.headline_hindi: नई नौकरी के लिए खुद को तैयार नहीं मानते हैं 84 फीसदी भारतीय
articles.summary: LinkedIn survey revealed 84% Indian professionals don't feel prepared for new job searches in 2026 due to rising competition, skill gaps and increasing AI use in recruitment. Since early 2022, the number of applicants per vacancy has doubled.

articles.headline: Rupee falls 3 paise to 89.90 against dollar
articles.headline_hindi: डॉलर के मुकाबले रुपये में कमजोरी
articles.summary: The rupee weakened 3 paise to close at 89.90 against the US dollar on Thursday, pressured by strong US dollar, FII capital outflows and weak domestic equity market sentiment.

articles.headline: SIP investments hit record Rs 31,002 crore in December
articles.headline_hindi: एसआईपी में रिकॉर्ड 31,002 करोड़ का निवेश, इक्विटी फंड में 6 फीसदी गिरावट
articles.summary: SIP investments in mutual funds reached a record Rs 31,002 crore in December 2025, up 17% YoY and 5.28% MoM. However, equity MF investments fell 6% to Rs 28,054 crore. Gold ETF investments hit record Rs 11,647 crore. Total AUM dipped to Rs 80.23 lakh crore. Total SIP accounts reached 9.79 crore.

articles.headline: Sensex falls for 5th straight session, Rs 13.49 lakh crore wealth eroded
articles.headline_hindi: सेंसेक्स लगातार पांच सत्रों में 2,186 अंक टूटा, 13.49 लाख करोड़ रुपये घटी संपत्ति
articles.summary: Sensex fell 604.72 points to 83,576.24 and Nifty dropped 193.55 points to 25,683.30 on Friday, marking fifth consecutive session of decline. Total wealth erosion over five sessions was Rs 13.49 lakh crore. FIIs sold Rs 3,769.31 crore while DIIs bought Rs 5,595.84 crore.

articles.headline: Vodafone Idea gets 15 years to pay AGR dues
articles.headline_hindi: वोडाफोन को राहत, अब 15 वर्षों में चुकाना होगा एजीआर बकाया
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea got major relief from the government with 15 years (until FY2041) to pay Rs 87,695 crore AGR dues. The company will pay Rs 1,144 crore annually for the first 10 years and Rs 124 crore for next 6 years, then Rs 100 crore for 4 years. Government holds 48.9% stake in VIL.

articles.headline: Silver jumps Rs 6,500, gold up Rs 1,200
articles.summary: Silver prices surged Rs 6,500 to Rs 2,50,000/kg and gold rose Rs 1,200 to Rs 1,41,700/10g in Delhi on Friday driven by fresh safe-haven demand amid global uncertainty and Trump's warnings on Iran. International gold was at $4,479.38/oz.

articles.headline: No need for rate cut with strong growth and controlled inflation: PwC
articles.headline_hindi: उच्च वृद्धि दर और महंगाई कम होने पर रेपो रेट में कटौती करने की जरूरत नहीं : पीडब्ल्यूसी
articles.summary: PwC Partner Ranen Banerjee said there's no need to cut interest rates given strong growth and controlled inflation. He compared unnecessary rate cuts to 'wasting a bullet.' Private capital investment is stalled due to demand uncertainty, not interest rates. RBI MPC meeting scheduled Feb 4-6.

articles.headline: India's forex reserves fall $9.8 billion in a week
articles.headline_hindi: देश के विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार में 9.8 अरब डॉलर गिरावट
articles.summary: India's foreign exchange reserves fell $9.80 billion to $686.80 billion in the week ending Jan 2, as RBI sold dollars to defend the rupee. Foreign currency assets dropped $7.62 billion. Gold reserves fell $2.05 billion to $111.26 billion.

articles.headline: Rupee falls 28 paise to below 90 mark
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया फिर 90 से नीचे, 28 पैसे गिरा
articles.summary: Rupee weakened 28 paise to 90.18 against the dollar on Friday, breaching the 90 level again. FII capital outflows, rising global tensions and crude oil prices pressured the domestic currency. It traded in the 89.88-90.25 range.

articles.headline: Multi-asset allocation funds deliver up to 22% returns in a year
articles.headline_hindi: मल्टी एसेट एलोकेशन ने एक साल में दिया 22 फीसदी तक रिटर्न
articles.summary: Multi-asset allocation funds that invest across gold, silver, equity and debt delivered strong returns. Nippon India Multi Asset Allocation Fund gave 22.71% in three years and 22.30% in one year. UTI Multi Asset returned 22.35% and HDFC Multi Asset 16.54% in one year.

articles.headline: Fake GST notices alert: CBIC warns taxpayers
articles.headline_hindi: फर्जी नोटिसों की तुरंत जानकारी दें करदाता
articles.summary: CBIC flagged concerns over fake GST notices being sent to businesses. Fraudsters are copying official GST documents, using fake CGST logos and fake DIN numbers. CBIC urged taxpayers to immediately report receiving such fraudulent notices.

articles.headline: SEBI amends trading system framework for technical glitches
articles.headline_hindi: ट्रेडिंग सिस्टम में गड़बड़ियों से निपटने को ढांचा बदला
articles.summary: SEBI revised the framework for dealing with technical glitches in electronic trading systems. Compliance rules simplified, small brokers exempted. Glitches beyond broker control no longer penalized. Framework applies only to brokers with 10,000+ registered clients.

articles.headline: SoftBank sells 2.15% stake in Ola Electric
articles.headline_hindi: सॉफ्टबैंक ने ओला में बेची 2.15 फीसदी हिस्सा
articles.summary: SoftBank's SVF-2 Ostrich sold 2.15% stake in Ola Electric Mobility between Sept 3 and Jan 5, 2026, selling 94,628,299 equity shares. SoftBank's stake reduced from 15.68% to 13.53%.

articles.headline: Five companies get SEBI nod for IPOs
articles.headline_hindi: पांच कंपनियों को सेबी ने दी आईपीओ की मंजूरी
articles.summary: OEMI Technology, Indo MIM and three others received SEBI approval to launch IPOs. Additionally, Kusumgar, Elcoqui Distilleries and Earth Spatiates also got approval. These five companies can raise over Rs 3,000 crore through IPOs.

articles.headline: Reliance Jio may raise Rs 36,000 crore via IPO
articles.headline_hindi: जियो में 2.5 फीसदी हिस्सा बेच 36,000 करोड़ जुटाएगी रिलायंस
articles.summary: Jio Platforms is considering an IPO by selling 2.5% stake, which could raise Rs 36,000 crore. Jefferies estimated Jio's valuation at $180 billion. Some bankers suggest $200-240 billion valuation. Jio has raised funds from KKR, General Atlantic, Silver Lake and Abu Dhabi Investment Authority.

articles.headline: UN says India's economy will grow exceptionally at 6.6% in 2026
articles.headline_hindi: चुनौतीपूर्ण माहौल में भी असाधारण रूप से बढ़ेगी भारतीय अर्थव्यवस्था : संयुक्त राष्ट्र
articles.summary: UN's World Economic Situation and Prospects 2026 report says India will grow 6.6% in 2026, supported by strong private consumption and public investment. India will remain fastest-growing major economy. South Asia will grow at 5.6% with India being the biggest contributor. AI adoption recommended to counter tariff impacts.

articles.headline: China emerges as top export destination for India at 4-year high
articles.headline_hindi: चीन को निर्यात चार साल के शीर्ष पर, बेहतर व्यापार संबंधों का असर
articles.summary: India's exports to China surged to a 4-year high in the April-November period of FY2025-26, signaling structural shift in bilateral trade relations. Key export items include oil cake, marine products, telecom equipment and spices. Electronic segment exports, especially printed circuit boards, also rose significantly.

articles.headline: Indian investors sending record money abroad for property and global stocks
articles.headline_hindi: भारतीय निवेशक प्रॉपर्टी और ग्लोबल स्टॉक्स खरीदने के लिए रिकॉर्ड मात्रा में पैसा विदेश भेज रहे हैं
articles.summary: Indian investors sent over $2 billion abroad in 9 months (Jan-Sep 2025) under LRS scheme, up 55% vs 2024. Real estate investment abroad rose 80% to $35 million. Equity and debt instrument investment rose 50%+ to $1.68 billion. GIFT City provides tax-free route for global investing.

articles.headline: Cash transaction limits and rules every taxpayer should know
articles.headline_hindi: कैश इस्तेमाल करने की याद रखें सीमा
articles.summary: Comprehensive guide on cash transaction limits under Indian tax law: Rs 20,000+ cash prohibited for property deals (Section 269SS), Rs 2 lakh limit for jewelry and luxury items, Rs 20,000+ cash loans to friends prohibited, and bank account transactions monitored via SFT.

articles.headline: Multi-cap vs flexi-cap funds: which is better for 2026
articles.headline_hindi: मल्टी कैप या फ्लेक्सी कैप: कौन-सा निवेश बेहतर
articles.summary: Analysis comparing multi-cap and flexi-cap funds for 2026 investing. Multi-cap funds received Rs 26,303 crore and flexi-cap Rs 64,540 crore in Apr-Dec 2025. Top performers: HDFC Flexi Cap (13.39% 1yr), Nippon Multi Cap (25.24% 5yr). Suggests age-based allocation strategy.

articles.headline: Nippon India Multi Asset Allocation Fund: the all-rounder
articles.headline_hindi: मल्टी एसेट निवेश का ऑलराउंडर
articles.summary: Nippon India Multi Asset Allocation Fund returned 19.56% in 2025 with allocation of 53% equity, 10% gold, 4% silver and rest in debt instruments. Expert Rajesh Bansal notes the fund's asset allocation strategy sets it apart from competitors in challenging market conditions.

articles.headline: Wrong UPI transfer: steps for recovery
articles.headline_hindi: गलत UPI ID पर गए पैसे, करें रिकवरी
articles.summary: Guide on recovering money sent to wrong UPI ID: file immediate complaint with transaction ID, contact bank's customer care, request receiver to return money, file complaint on NPCI portal, and approach RBI Banking Ombudsman as last resort.

articles.headline: 2025's biggest IPO winners and losers
articles.headline_hindi: 2025 के सबसे बड़े हीरो और जीरो IPO
articles.summary: 2025 was a rollercoaster for IPO market with 107 mainboard IPOs raising Rs 1.83 lakh crore. Top gainers: Ather Energy (105%), Stallion India (88%), Quality Power (84%). Top losers: Laxmi Dental (-54%), Jaro Institute (-52%), VMS TMT (-51%).

articles.headline: Market rebounds after 5-session fall, Sensex recovers 1,017 points from day's low
articles.headline_hindi: बाजार में पांच सत्रों की गिरावट थमी, दिन के निचले स्तर से 1,017 अंक उबरा सेंसेक्स
articles.summary: Sensex rebounded 301.93 points to close at 83,878.17 after recovering 1,017 points from day's low of 82,861.07. Nifty rose 106.95 points to 25,790.25. Rally driven by new hopes for India-US trade deal and buying in energy, banking and metal shares. DIIs bought Rs 5,839.32 crore, while FIIs sold Rs 3,638.40 crore.

articles.headline: Direct tax collection up 9% to Rs 18.38 lakh crore
articles.headline_hindi: प्रत्यक्ष कर संग्रह 9 फीसदी बढ़कर 18.38 लाख करोड़
articles.summary: Net direct tax collection grew 8.82% to Rs 18.38 lakh crore up to Jan 11. Gross collection rose 4.14% to Rs 21.50 lakh crore. Corporate tax collection exceeded Rs 8.63 lakh crore. Government targets Rs 25.20 lakh crore for FY2025-26, 12.7% higher than previous year. Refunds dropped 17% to Rs 3.12 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Food prices up but retail inflation still below 2% for fourth consecutive month
articles.headline_hindi: खाद्य वस्तुओं के दाम बढ़े, फिर भी खुदरा महंगाई लगातार चौथे महीने 2% से कम
articles.summary: CPI retail inflation rose to 1.33% in December 2025, a three-month high, but remained below RBI's 2% lower comfort level for the fourth consecutive month. Food inflation improved to -2.71% from -3.91% in November. Urban inflation crossed 2% to 2.03%. Personal care segment saw highest inflation at 28.07%.

articles.headline: AC prices to rise twice before summer due to new star rating norms
articles.headline_hindi: गर्मियों में एसी खरीदना पड़ेगा महंगा, मई तक दो बार बढ़ सकती है कीमत
articles.summary: Room AC prices may increase twice in 2026 - first 7-8% hike in January due to new BEE star rating system, and second in April-May. New 5-star AC will be equivalent to current 6-7 star, making it more energy efficient but expensive. Industry expects 20-22% sales growth in 2026.

articles.headline: India leads world in adopting agentic AI
articles.headline_hindi: एजेंटिक एआई अपनाने में भारत दुनिया में सबसे आगे
articles.summary: India leads the world in adopting agentic AI according to ThoughtWorks survey, ahead of the US which is second and Australia third. 86% of people say AI is enhancing career talent rather than destroying jobs. Indian IT giants see 15% revenue growth potential from AI in 5 years.

articles.headline: Cotton import duty removal demanded by textile industry
articles.headline_hindi: कपास पर आयात शुल्क हटाने की मांग
articles.summary: Indian Cotton Industry Federation demanded permanent removal of 11% import duty on cotton from Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan. This would help reduce cost pressure on domestic companies.

articles.headline: Reliance's battery storage manufacturing plans on track
articles.headline_hindi: रिलायंस का बैटरी स्टोरेज निर्माण पर जोर
articles.summary: Reliance Industries' battery storage manufacturing plans remain on track with no changes to the timeline. The company aims to start manufacturing battery cells with 40 GW annual capacity, from cell to containerized ESS, by 2026.

articles.headline: Maruti to invest Rs 4,960 crore in Gujarat expansion
articles.headline_hindi: मारुति गुजरात में करेगी 4,960 करोड़ का निवेश
articles.summary: Maruti Suzuki India's board approved Rs 4,960 crore investment for land acquisition and production capacity expansion at Khoraj Industrial Estate in Gujarat through GIDC. The proposed expansion is up to 10 lakh units.

articles.headline: Educational institutions' revenue to grow 13% this year
articles.headline_hindi: शैक्षणिक संस्थानों की आय 13 फीसदी बढ़ेगी
articles.summary: Educational institutions' revenue expected to grow 11-13% in current and next fiscal year, driven by rising enrollments and fee hikes. Operating margins to remain stable at 27-28%, according to Fitch Ratings.

articles.headline: Construction equipment sales drop 9% in April-December
articles.headline_hindi: निर्माण उपकरणों की बिक्री नौ फीसदी घटी
articles.summary: Domestic construction equipment sales fell 9% to 81,566 units in April-December 2025 due to slowdown in infrastructure activities and project completion difficulties. However, exports rose to 12,469 units from 9,733 units.

articles.headline: TCS and HCL profits decline up to 14% due to labor code changes
articles.headline_hindi: टीसीएस और एचसीएल का लाभ 14 फीसदी तक घटा
articles.summary: TCS Q3 profit fell 13.91% to Rs 10,657 crore and HCL Tech profit dropped 11.2% to Rs 4,076 crore due to restructuring and new labor code impact. TCS saw Rs 2,128 crore impact from labor code changes. TCS revenue rose 4.86% to Rs 67,087 crore; HCL revenue up 13.3% to Rs 33,872 crore. TCS declared Rs 57 total dividend.

articles.headline: Shubhranshu Singh selected for Effie Lions Global Fellowship
articles.headline_hindi: ग्लोबल फेलोशिप के लिए चुने गए शुभ्रांशु सिंह
articles.summary: Shubhranshu Singh, marketing consultant and Effie Lions Foundation global board member, selected for Global Fellowship by Marketing Academy London. Only 30 people globally and 2 Indians were selected. First seasonal camp to be held at McKinsey University, Austria.

articles.headline: Government finalizing rare earth mineral permanent magnet manufacturing scheme
articles.headline_hindi: रेअर अर्थ योजना प्रस्तावों को अंतिम रूप दे रही सरकार
articles.summary: Heavy Industries Minister H D Kumaraswamy said the government is finalizing the Request for Proposal (RFP) for the rare earth mineral permanent magnet manufacturing scheme. He invited domestic and international companies to participate in the bidding process.

articles.headline: BSE and NSE to remain closed on January 15
articles.headline_hindi: 15 को बंद रहेगा बाजार
articles.summary: BSE and NSE will remain closed on January 15 (Thursday) due to Maharashtra local body elections. Equity, derivatives and commodity segments will be closed, though regular trading will take place.

articles.headline: GST 2.0 drives auto industry to record 44.89 lakh passenger vehicle sales
articles.headline_hindi: जीएसटी 2.0 ने बढ़ाई ऑटो उद्योग की गति, टिके रिकॉर्ड 44.89 लाख यात्री वाहन
articles.summary: Indian passenger vehicle wholesale sales hit a record 44.89 lakh+ units in 2025, up 5% from 2024's 42.74 lakh. Utility vehicles led with 7% growth to 29.54 lakh units. Two-wheeler sales crossed 2 crore for the first time. December 2025 saw 26.6% YoY growth in PV sales to 3,99,216 units. GST rate cuts, income tax relief and repo rate cuts fueled the growth.

articles.headline: NPS to get guaranteed pension scheme
articles.headline_hindi: एनपीएस में मिलेगी गारंटी पेंशन
articles.summary: Government has started preparations to provide guaranteed pension under NPS similar to UPS. PFRDA formed a 15-member high-level committee chaired by former IBBI Chairman Dr. M.S. Sahoo to develop framework and rules for market-based guarantees and subscriber protection.

articles.headline: Iran tensions affecting Indian basmati rice exports
articles.headline_hindi: ईरान में तनाव से भारतीय बासमती चावल के निर्यात पर असर
articles.summary: Iran tensions impacting India's basmati rice exports with payment delays and increased uncertainty for exporters. Iran is India's largest basmati market. Domestic basmati prices have fallen sharply. IREF warned exporters to adopt safe payment methods and explore alternative markets in West Asia, Africa and Europe.

articles.headline: Electronic exports cross Rs 4 lakh crore in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: 2025 में इलेक्ट्रॉनिक निर्यात चार लाख करोड़ रुपये के पार
articles.summary: India's electronic exports exceeded Rs 4 lakh crore in 2025 driven by government's manufacturing push. Minister Ashwini Vaishnav said four semiconductor plants will begin production in 2026, further boosting exports. iPhone exports from India reached Rs 2.03 lakh crore in 2025. Mobile phone production could reach 30 billion units by end of FY2025-26.

articles.headline: Silver hits record Rs 2.71 lakh per kg, gold also at new high
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी रिकॉर्ड 2.71 लाख रुपये पहुंची, सोना भी नई ऊंचाई पर
articles.summary: Silver surged to record Rs 2,71,000/kg and gold reached Rs 1,45,000/10g in Delhi. Silver gained Rs 21,000/kg in three sessions and Rs 32,000 since Dec 31, 2025. International gold hit $4,586.49/oz and silver reached $85.64/oz. Safe-haven demand amid global tensions drove prices higher.

articles.headline: India slips to 3rd in Russian oil buyers as Reliance cuts imports
articles.headline_hindi: रिलायंस इंडस्ट्रीज और सरकारी रिफाइनरियों ने मास्को से क्रूड आयात में की कटौती
articles.summary: India became the third-largest buyer of Russian fossil fuels in December 2025 as Reliance Industries and government refineries sharply cut Russian crude imports. Russia's share in India's total oil imports fell 10 percentage points to 25% in December. Turkey overtook India at 2nd position with 2.6 billion euros. China remained top buyer.

articles.headline: Central government capex may slow in remaining months: Morgan Stanley
articles.headline_hindi: पहली छमाही में भारी खर्च से केंद्र के पूंजीगत व्यय में आ सकती है गिरावट
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley warns central government may slow capital expenditure in remaining months of FY2025-26 as 58.7% of budgeted Rs 11.21 lakh crore has already been spent in April-November. Capital spending reached Rs 6.6 lakh crore. Roads and railways account for 55% of capex. State capex remains at 1.7% of GDP.

articles.headline: Vegetable oil imports rise 8% to 13.83 lakh tons
articles.headline_hindi: वनस्पति तेल आयात 8% बढ़कर 13.83 लाख टन
articles.summary: Vegetable oil imports in December 2025 rose 8% YoY to 13.83 lakh tons, driven by sharp increase in soybean and sunflower oil exports. Palm oil imports fell 20% to 5.07 lakh tons. Crude palm oil imports rose from 3.26 to 5.03 lakh tons.

articles.headline: Kisna to hire 1,200 employees this fiscal year
articles.headline_hindi: किसना ब्रांड देगा 1,200 कर्मचारियों को नौकरी
articles.summary: Hari Krishna Group's diamond and gold jewelry brand Kisna plans to hire 1,200 new employees this year for retail expansion. The company hired 1,000 employees in 2024-25. MD Parag Shah cited growing jewelry consumption driven by Gen Z and modern women.

articles.headline: RBI proposes resuming urban cooperative bank licensing
articles.headline_hindi: शहरी सहकारी बैंकों के लिए फिर जारी होगा लाइसेंस
articles.summary: RBI has proposed resuming the licensing process for urban cooperative banks (UCBs) after a two-decade hiatus since 2004. The process will be subject to regulatory requirements including minimum capital of Rs 300 crore.

articles.headline: Ducati to launch 10 new motorcycle models in India this year
articles.headline_hindi: रुकाटी लॉन्च करेगी इस साल 10 मॉडल
articles.summary: Italian luxury motorcycle manufacturer Ducati plans to launch 10 new and updated motorcycle models in the Indian market this year including Desmo 450 MSX, new Multistrada V4 Rally 2026 edition, Panigale V4 Lamborghini, new Monster V2, and HyperMotard V2/V2 SP.

articles.headline: RedTape founder to sell 51 crore dollar stake to PE firms
articles.headline_hindi: रेडटेप संस्थापक 51 करोड़ डॉलर में बेचेंगे हिस्सेदारी
articles.summary: RedTape founder plans to sell his majority stake for $51 crore (~Rs 460 crore), with BlackStone and KKR as potential buyers. Shares jumped 12% on the news, rising up to 16% intraday. Founded in 1996, RedTape competes with Nike and Bata India.

articles.headline: Bank of Maharashtra posts Rs 1,779 crore profit
articles.headline_hindi: बैंक ऑफ महाराष्ट्र को 1,779 करोड़ का लाभ
articles.summary: Bank of Maharashtra reported Rs 1,779 crore profit in Q3, up 26.5% QoQ. Total income rose to Rs 8,277 crore. Net interest income grew 16% to Rs 3,422 crore. Board approved Rs 1 interim dividend per share.

articles.headline: Sensex falls 250 points on FII selling
articles.headline_hindi: विदेशी निवेशकों की बिकवाली से 250 अंक टूट गया सेंसेक्स
articles.summary: Sensex fell 250.48 points to 83,627.69 and Nifty dropped 57.95 points to 25,732.30 on Tuesday due to FII selling and weak quarterly earnings start. FIIs sold Rs 1,499.8 crore. Market cap fell Rs 93,467 crore. 19 of Sensex 30 stocks declined with Trent falling the most at 3.39%.

articles.headline: Jan Dhan accounts cross 53 crore, deposits reach Rs 2.29 lakh crore
articles.headline_hindi: जनधन योजना के तहत खातों में जमा राशि बढ़कर 2.29 लाख करोड़ रुपये
articles.summary: Over 53 crore bank accounts opened under Jan Dhan Yojana with 72% in rural/semi-urban areas and 56% women account holders. Deposits grew to Rs 2.29 lakh crore. 6 lakh banking correspondents provide services in villages. Under Mudra scheme, 56.3 crore loans worth Rs 38 lakh crore sanctioned with 67% to women entrepreneurs.

articles.headline: Wholesale inflation hits 8-month high due to surge in food prices
articles.headline_hindi: थोक महंगाई आठ महीने में सबसे ज्यादा, खाद्य वस्तुओं की कीमतों में उबाल
articles.summary: WPI inflation rose to 0.83% in December 2025, the highest in 8 months. Food items, manufactured products and non-food articles drove the increase. Calendar year 2025 average WPI was only 0.6% vs 1.74% in 2024.

articles.headline: Silver surges Rs 15,000 to record Rs 2.86 lakh; gold also hits new high
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी 15,000 रुपये बढ़कर 2.86 लाख के नए शिखर पर, सोने ने भी बनाया रिकॉर्ड
articles.summary: Silver jumped Rs 15,000 in one session to a record Rs 2.86 lakh per kg. Gold rose Rs 1,500 to Rs 1,46,500 per 10g. Internationally, silver crossed $91/oz for the first time. Supply crisis and industrial demand driving prices.

articles.headline: Sensex drops 249 points on selling in large-cap stocks
articles.headline_hindi: बड़ी कंपनियों में बिकवाली से सेंसेक्स 249 अंक टूटा
articles.summary: Sensex fell 244.98 points to 83,382.71 and Nifty dropped 66.70 points to 25,665.60. FII sold Rs 4,781 crore while DII bought Rs 5,217 crore. 18 of 30 Sensex stocks closed in red.

articles.headline: New labor laws impact: Infosys profit drops 2.2%
articles.headline_hindi: नए श्रम कानून का असर, 2.2 फीसदी घटा इन्फोसिस का लाभ
articles.summary: Infosys Q3 profit fell to Rs 6,654 crore due to Rs 1,289 crore one-time charge from new labor laws. Revenue grew 8.89% to Rs 45,479 crore. Company raised full-year revenue growth guidance to 3-3.5%. Headcount increased by 5,043 to 3,37,034.

articles.headline: Deloitte: India GDP to grow 7.5-7.8% in FY26 on festive demand
articles.headline_hindi: त्योहारी मांग के दम पर 7.8 फीसदी की रफ्तार से बढ़ेगी जीडीपी
articles.summary: Deloitte India projects India's GDP growth at 7.5-7.8% for FY26 driven by festive demand and strong services. Growth may slow to 6.6-6.9% in FY27 due to global uncertainties. Small cities to emerge as growth engines.

articles.headline: SMBC gets approval to set up wholly-owned subsidiary in India
articles.headline_hindi: एसएमबीसी को मिली कंपनी खोलने की मंजूरी
articles.summary: RBI has given in-principle approval to Japan's Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary in India. SMBC has acquired 24.22% stake in Yes Bank.

articles.headline: Bajaj Mobility to lay off 500 employees at KTM
articles.headline_hindi: बजाज मोबिलिटी 500 लोगों की करेगी छंटनी
articles.summary: Bajaj Mobility AG announced layoffs of approximately 500 employees at KTM AG as part of a global restructuring program to reduce fixed costs. Bajaj Auto had acquired majority stake in Austrian bike maker KTM in November.

articles.headline: Union Bank profit rises to Rs 5,073 crore in Q3
articles.headline_hindi: यूनियन बैंक को 5,073 करोड़ रुपये का फायदा
articles.summary: Union Bank net profit rose 9.7% to Rs 5,073 crore in Q3. Deposit growth rate was 3.36%, below banking system average. Bank found Rs 4,200 crore gap between existing and expected credit loss provisions.

articles.headline: Niti Aayog releases 4th Export Preparedness Index; UP ranks 4th among large states
articles.headline_hindi: नीति आयोग ने जारी किया चौथा निर्यात तैयारी सूचकांक
articles.summary: Niti Aayog released the 4th Export Preparedness Index. Maharashtra topped among large states, UP moved to 4th. Among landlocked states, UP ranked first. Uttarakhand topped small states. Delhi ranked 29th overall.

articles.headline: IOC and BPCL discover oil reserves in Abu Dhabi
articles.headline_hindi: आईओसी और बीपीसीएल ने अबूधाबी में खोजे तेल भंडार
articles.summary: Indian Oil Corporation and BPCL have discovered oil reserves in an offshore block in Abu Dhabi. Their joint venture UBPL invested around $16 crore in the exploration phase covering 6,162 sq km.

articles.headline: Record Rs 14.25 billion equity investment in Indian real estate in 2025
articles.headline_hindi: रियल एस्टेट में रिकॉर्ड 14.25 अरब डॉलर का इक्विटी निवेश
articles.summary: Indian real estate attracted record $14.25 billion equity investment in 2025, up 25% YoY from $11.43 billion. Land/development dominated at 46% of total investment. CBRE reports strong institutional interest.

articles.headline: WEF Global Risks Report: Economic conflict between nations is biggest threat
articles.headline_hindi: विश्व आर्थिक मंच की रिपोर्ट: कई देशों के बीच आर्थिक टकराव दुनिया के लिए सबसे बड़ा खतरा
articles.summary: World Economic Forum's Global Risks Report identifies geo-economic conflicts as top risk for 2 years. Misinformation, social polarization and extreme weather are also major concerns. 40% of surveyed people expect unstable world next decade.

articles.headline: December hiring activity up 15%, AI dominates recruitment
articles.headline_hindi: दिसंबर में भर्ती गतिविधियां 15 फीसदी बढ़ीं, एआई का दबदबा
articles.summary: Hiring activities in December 2025 rose 15% YoY and 5% MoM. AI emerged as the biggest factor in recruitment. IT-software had 37% share of AI jobs. BFSI sector had 15.8% AI hiring share. Bangalore led with 26% share.

articles.headline: IOB profit jumps 56% to Rs 1,365 crore
articles.headline_hindi: आईओबी के मुनाफे में 56 फीसदी की वृद्धि
articles.summary: Indian Overseas Bank profit rose 56.2% to Rs 1,365 crore in Q3. Income grew to Rs 9,672 crore. Gross NPA fell to 1.54%. Business grew 18.7% to Rs 6.44 lakh crore.

articles.headline: SEBI settles with Blue Coast Hotels for Rs 89 lakh
articles.headline_hindi: सेबी के साथ ब्लू कोस्ट का 89 लाख में समझौता
articles.summary: Blue Coast Hotels and its promoter settled with SEBI for Rs 89.3 lakh over alleged disclosure norm violations found in financial statements from 2018-19 to 2021-22.

articles.headline: Budget to market webinar series by Amar Ujala The Bonus
articles.headline_hindi: बजट से बाजार तक का सफर इस बार समझ, जानिए निवेश को लेकर कैसे करें तैयारी
articles.summary: Amar Ujala's The Bonus team is organizing a 3-part webinar series to help readers understand the Union Budget and its impact on markets, mutual funds, and commodities. First webinar on Jan 17.

articles.headline: India's goods exports rise 1.87% despite global challenges; trade deficit marginally widens
articles.headline_hindi: वैश्विक चुनौतियों के बाद भी निर्यात में 1.87 फीसदी उछाल, मामूली बढ़ा व्यापार घाटा
articles.summary: India's goods exports in December 2025 rose 1.87% to $38.51 billion. Imports grew 8.7% to $63.55 billion. Trade deficit widened marginally to $25.04 billion. Gold imports fell 12%. Commerce Secretary expects total exports to cross $850 billion in FY26.

articles.headline: Silver approaches Rs 2.90 lakh; gold up Rs 800
articles.headline_hindi: रिकॉर्ड: चांदी 2.90 लाख के करीब, सोना 800 महंगा
articles.summary: Silver rose Rs 3,000 to Rs 2.89 lakh per kg, approaching Rs 2.90 lakh. Gold climbed Rs 800 to Rs 1,47,300 per 10g all-time high. Silver has surged 16% or Rs 45,500 in five sessions.

articles.headline: India becoming world's second largest factory but foreign brands benefiting more from PLI
articles.headline_hindi: सबसे बड़े उपभोक्ता बाजार के साथ दुनिया की दूसरी बड़ी फैक्ट्री बना भारत, पर...
articles.summary: India has become world's largest consumer market and second largest factory. Mobile production surged 28x from Rs 18,000 crore to Rs 5.45 lakh crore in a decade. However, foreign brands like Samsung and Asus benefit more from PLI and government tenders than domestic companies.

articles.headline: Biocon raises Rs 4,150 crore via QIP
articles.headline_hindi: बायोकॉन ने जुटाए 4,150 करोड़ रुपये
articles.summary: Biocon raised Rs 4,150 crore through Qualified Institutional Placement. 11.26 crore equity shares issued at Rs 368.35 per share. Received good response from domestic and international investors.

articles.headline: India reducing dependence on US, diversifying export markets
articles.headline_hindi: ट्रंप टैरिफ के असर को कम करने के लिए निर्यात बाजार में विविधता
articles.summary: India is diversifying export markets to counter Trump tariffs. US share in India's exports dropped from 22.5% to 17.8%. Exports to UAE, China, Saudi Arabia, Spain and Hong Kong increased. Electronics exports up 37.3% YoY.

articles.headline: Bajaj General Insurance launches fetal health insurance policy
articles.headline_hindi: अब गर्भ में पल रहे बच्चे को भी मिलेगा स्वास्थ्य बीमा का लाभ
articles.summary: Bajaj General Insurance launched 'Fetal Flourish' policy covering 16 prenatal procedures for women aged 18-45. Premium starts at Rs 1,025. Includes Rs 2 lakh rider for two maternity events.

articles.headline: Unemployment rate rises marginally to 4.8% in December
articles.headline_hindi: देश में बेरोजगारी दर 4.8 फीसदी पर पहुंची, शहरी इलाकों में बढ़ी
articles.summary: India's unemployment rate for persons 15+ rose marginally to 4.8% in December 2025 from 4.7% in November. Urban unemployment increased while rural remained stable. Labor force participation rate rose to 56.1%.

articles.headline: Sony India revenue rises to Rs 7,851 crore
articles.headline_hindi: सोनी इंडिया का राजस्व बढ़कर 7,851 करोड़
articles.summary: Sony India's operating revenue rose 2.44% to Rs 7,851 crore in FY25. Profit fell 6% to Rs 157 crore. India is Sony's 4th largest market after US, China and Japan.

articles.headline: PFC to raise Rs 5,000 crore through NCD issue
articles.headline_hindi: एनसीडी से पीएफसी जुटाएगी 5,000 करोड़
articles.summary: Power Finance Corporation's 3rd NCD issue opens January 16 to raise up to Rs 5,000 crore. Base issue size is Rs 500 crore with green shoe option. The 30-month tenure bonds will close January 30.

articles.headline: South Indian Bank profit up 9% to Rs 374 crore
articles.headline_hindi: साउथ इंडियन बैंक का मुनाफा 9 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: South Indian Bank Q3 profit rose 9.3% to Rs 374 crore. Total income reached Rs 3,003 crore. Gross NPA improved to 2.67%. Interest income grew to Rs 2,518 crore.

articles.headline: Opportunity funds deliver 27% returns in 5 years
articles.headline_hindi: अपच्यूनिटीज फंडों से पांच साल में मिला 27 फीसदी लाभ
articles.summary: Opportunity-themed mutual funds delivered up to 27% returns over 5 years. ICICI Prudential Opportunities scheme topped with 27% returns. Franklin India Fund gave 20.69% and Sundaram Services 19.04% over 5 years.

articles.headline: Mondelez India revenue declines 1.91% to Rs 12,503 crore
articles.headline_hindi: मोंडेलेज का राजस्व घटा 12,503 करोड़ रुपये
articles.summary: Mondelez India (Cadbury) FY25 operating revenue fell 1.91% to Rs 12,503 crore. Profit plunged 99.4% to Rs 12.47 crore. Cadbury Dairy Milk, 5 Star, Oreo, Gems brands affected.

articles.headline: Jio Financial Services profit falls 9% to Rs 269 crore
articles.headline_hindi: जियो फाइनेंशियल का लाभ 9 फीसदी घटकर 269 करोड़
articles.summary: Jio Financial Services consolidated net profit fell 9% to Rs 269 crore in Q3 from Rs 295 crore a year ago. Total income nearly doubled to Rs 901 crore from Rs 449 crore. Expenses rose to Rs 566 crore.

articles.headline: India-US trade deal near finalization
articles.headline_hindi: भारत-अमेरिका व्यापार समझौते को अंतिम रूप देने के करीब
articles.summary: Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal said India and US are very close to finalizing a bilateral trade agreement. Talks have never broken down and both sides have remained in constant contact.
