articles.headline: NSE settlement petition accepted by SEBI; IPO likely soon
articles.headline_hindi: एनएसई की समझौता याचिका पर सेबी राजी, जल्द आएगा आईपीओ
articles.summary: SEBI has in-principle agreed to NSE's settlement petition in the co-location unfair market access case. NSE offered Rs 1,388 crore payment in 2025. This paves the way for NSE's long-pending IPO. Large companies can sell 2.5% stake in IPOs.

articles.headline: China's 5% GDP growth target under threat due to real estate crisis
articles.headline_hindi: चीन के 5 फीसदी विकास लक्ष्य पर संकट, हाईटेक रणनीति से नहीं बन रही बात
articles.summary: China's 5% GDP growth target is under threat as real estate crisis and traditional sector weakness offset high-tech gains. Rhodium Group says new industries added only 0.8 points to growth. Property sector once contributed over 25% of GDP.

articles.headline: Postal exports to get export incentive scheme benefits from Jan 15
articles.headline_hindi: डाक से माल भेजने पर भी मिलेगा निर्यात प्रोत्साहन योजना का लाभ
articles.summary: Government extended RoDTEP and RoSCTL export incentive schemes to goods exported via postal channels from January 15, 2026. This will boost MSME exporters especially in small towns. CBIC amended regulations to enable duty drawback claims for postal exports.

articles.headline: Silver continues record rally, up Rs 3,600 to Rs 2.92 lakh; gold slips from peak
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी में रिकॉर्ड तेजी जारी...3,600 रुपये बढ़कर 2.92 लाख पार, सोना शिखर से 1,100 फिसला
articles.summary: Silver continued its record rally for the 6th consecutive session, rising Rs 3,600 to Rs 2,92,600 per kg. However, gold slipped Rs 1,100 from its peak to Rs 1,46,200 per 10g. Silver has gained 22.4% this year, outperforming gold for the second consecutive year.

articles.headline: WEF confident on India: Recent economic performance better than expected
articles.headline_hindi: विश्व आर्थिक मंच को भारत पर भरोसा...कहा, हालिया आर्थिक प्रदर्शन उम्मीद से बेहतर
articles.summary: World Economic Forum said India is pushing South Asia on the growth path despite trade tensions. 53% of chief economists expect weaker global conditions. IMF likely to raise India's growth estimate. Financial services, healthcare and retail sectors to grow fastest.

articles.headline: Rupee falls 44 paise to near record low of 90.78
articles.headline_hindi: रुपये में 44 पैसे की गिरावट, रिकॉर्ड निचले स्तर के करीब
articles.summary: Rupee fell 44 paise to 90.78 against the dollar, near its record low of 90.93. Rising crude oil prices and continued FII outflows pressured the currency. Analysts expect rupee to trade in 90.50-91.25 range.

articles.headline: ESIC registers 1.03 crore employees under SPREE scheme
articles.headline_hindi: ईएसआईसी: योजना से जुड़े 1.03 करोड़ कर्मचारी
articles.summary: ESIC registered 1.17 lakh new employers and 1.03 crore employees under its SPREE scheme launched in July 2025. The scheme provides one-time opportunity for those who inadvertently missed ESI coverage.

articles.headline: Foreign exchange reserves rise by $39.2 crore to $687.19 billion
articles.headline_hindi: विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार में 39.2 करोड़ डॉलर वृद्धि
articles.summary: India's forex reserves rose by $39.2 crore to $687.19 billion for the week ending January 9. However, foreign currency assets fell by $1.12 billion to $550.86 billion. Gold reserves rose by $1.568 billion to $112.83 billion.

articles.headline: Tech Mahindra reports Rs 1,122 crore profit in Q3
articles.headline_hindi: टेक महिंद्रा को 1,122 करोड़ का शुद्ध मुनाफा
articles.summary: Tech Mahindra Q3 net profit was Rs 1,122 crore, up 14.11% YoY. Revenue rose to Rs 14,393 crore from Rs 13,286 crore. Higher tax provisions due to new labor laws increased costs. Headcount fell by 872.

articles.headline: Reliance Q3 profit marginally rises to Rs 18,645 crore; Jio profit up 11.3%
articles.headline_hindi: खुदरा कारोबार में धीमी वृद्धि से मामूली बढ़ा रिलायंस का मुनाफा
articles.summary: Reliance Industries Q3 profit marginally rose to Rs 18,645 crore from Rs 18,540 crore. Revenue grew to Rs 2.69 lakh crore. Jio Platforms profit rose 11.3% to Rs 7,629 crore with subscriber base of 51.53 crore. Retail was impacted by GST cuts and consumer business separation.

articles.headline: Wipro profit drops 7%; announces Rs 6 dividend
articles.headline_hindi: विप्रो 6 रुपये लाभांश देगी
articles.summary: Wipro Q3 profit fell 7% to Rs 3,119 crore due to new labor law impact. Company hired 6,529 people in Q3 and plans to hire 8,000 by year-end. Board declared Rs 6 interim dividend. Attrition rate improved to 13.8% from 14.2%.

articles.headline: IT-Fintech sector to create 1.28 crore jobs this year
articles.headline_hindi: आईटी-फिनटेक क्षेत्र में इस साल सृजित होंगी 1.28 करोड़ नौकरियां
articles.summary: NLB Services projects 1.28 crore new jobs in IT services, fintech and green energy sectors in 2026. AI and future-ready workforce demand to drive hiring. Youth hiring expected to grow 11%. AI demand up 51%.

articles.headline: Central Bank of India profit jumps 32% to Rs 1,263 crore
articles.headline_hindi: सेंट्ल बैंक के मुनाफे में 32 फीसदी की वृद्धि
articles.summary: Central Bank of India Q3 profit rose 32% to Rs 1,263 crore. Income grew to Rs 10,969 crore. Gross NPA improved to 2.7%. Total business stood at Rs 7.74 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Federal Bank Q3 profit at Rs 1,041 crore, up 9%
articles.headline_hindi: फेडरल बैंक को 1,041 करोड़ का फायदा
articles.summary: Federal Bank Q3 profit rose 9% to Rs 1,041 crore. Net interest income grew 9% to Rs 2,653 crore. Non-interest income jumped 20%. 47% of loan assets linked to repo rate. Gross NPA improved to 1.72%.

articles.headline: India ranks second globally in 5G subscribers with 40 crore users
articles.headline_hindi: 5जी उपभोक्ताओं के मामले में दुनिया में दूसरे स्थान पर भारत
articles.summary: India has become world's second largest 5G market with 40 crore+ subscribers, behind only China. Telecom Minister Scindia said 99.6% of customers now have 5G access, covering 85% of the population. India developed 5G tech in just 2 years.

articles.headline: Nutraceuticals: The rising global empire of health supplements
articles.headline_hindi: लंबी उम्र नहीं, स्वस्थ जिंदगी: दुनियाभर में न्यूट्रास्यूटिकल्स का उभरता साम्राज्य
articles.summary: Global nutraceuticals market exceeds $350 billion with 6% annual growth. India targets developing a $100 billion nutraceuticals market by 2035. US accounts for 25-30% of global market. Regulations vary significantly across countries.

articles.headline: SEBI proposes easier KYC registration for investors
articles.headline_hindi: सेबी का प्रस्ताव: ग्राहक पंजीकरण प्रक्रिया होगी आसान
articles.summary: SEBI proposed measures to simplify customer identification and KYC registration processes. Centralization of supplementary information during KRA-level registration will reduce repeated data submission across intermediaries.

articles.headline: Budget day February 1 to be a trading day despite being Sunday
articles.headline_hindi: बजट के दिन रविवार को भी खुले रहेंगे शेयर बाजार
articles.summary: BSE and NSE will remain open for trading on February 1 (Sunday) as Union Budget is being presented that day. Normal trading session from 9.15 AM to 3.30 PM.

articles.headline: TCS refund on car purchase: How to claim back 1% tax collected at source
articles.headline_hindi: कार खरीदने पर TCS को पा सकते हैं वापस
articles.summary: Guide explaining how buyers of cars worth over Rs 10 lakh can claim back the 1% TCS (Tax Collected at Source) through income tax return filing. The amount is adjusted against tax liability or refunded within 2-3 months.

articles.headline: Momentum investing: Strategy to profit from market trends
articles.headline_hindi: मोमेंटम इन्वेस्टिंग: ट्रेंड्स को मुनाफे में बदलने की रणनीति
articles.summary: Detailed explainer on momentum investing strategy. Nifty 200 Momentum 30 Index delivered 23.8% returns over 15 years vs Nifty 50's 13.2%. Article covers RSI, moving averages, volume analysis and stop-loss strategies.

articles.headline: Tax saving tips on selling residential property
articles.headline_hindi: घर बेचने पर इस तरह बचा सकते हैं टैक्स
articles.summary: Guide on capital gains tax when selling residential property. Long-term gains (after 24 months) taxed at 12.50%. Tax can be saved by reinvesting in new house or bonds from NHAI, REC, PFC, IRFC.

articles.headline: Mirae Asset Gold-Silver Passive Fund delivers 77% returns
articles.headline_hindi: गोल्ड-सिल्वर पैसिव फंड ने सुरक्षा के साथ मोटा रिटर्न भी दिया
articles.summary: Mirae Asset Gold-Silver Passive Fund of Fund delivered approximately 77% returns since launch in August 2025, with 23% gain in just one month. Silver ETFs overall saw AUM surge from Rs 12,317 crore to Rs 72,652 crore in one year.

articles.headline: Cyber insurance: Essential protection against growing online fraud
articles.headline_hindi: बढ़ता ऑनलाइन फ्रॉड, ढाल बनेगा साइबर इंश्योरेंस
articles.summary: With over 26.5 crore cyber attacks in 2025 (7 lakh+ daily), personal cyber insurance has become essential. Article covers types of cyber crimes, insurance benefits, policy selection tips, and coverage details.

articles.headline: SBI increases ATM charges for savings and salary accounts
articles.headline_hindi: सेविंग व सैलरी अकाउंट पर बढ़े ATM चार्ज
articles.summary: SBI has increased ATM charges due to higher interchange fees. Savings account holders get 5 free transactions at other bank ATMs (charge raised to Rs 23 + GST from Rs 21). Salary account holders now get 10 free transactions instead of unlimited.

articles.headline: Silver ETF performance: Over 200% returns in one year
articles.headline_hindi: सिल्वर ETF का जलवा
articles.summary: Silver ETFs delivered over 200% returns in one year. SBI Silver ETF FoF topped with 205.95%, followed by ABSL and HDFC Silver ETF FoF at 203.60%. Geopolitical tensions and global trade changes driving silver to new highs.

articles.headline: Silver crosses Rs 3 lakh for first time; gold also hits new record
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी पहली बार तीन लाख पार...10,000 रुपये बढ़े दाम, सोना भी नए शिखर पर
articles.summary: Silver breached Rs 3 lakh per kg for the first time, surging Rs 10,000 to Rs 3,02,600. Gold rose Rs 1,900 to record Rs 1,48,100 per 10g. Silver has gained Rs 59,100 or 24.27% in seven sessions. Internationally, silver hit $94.13/oz and gold $4,690.80/oz.

articles.headline: IMF raises India's growth forecast; to remain fastest growing major economy
articles.headline_hindi: आईएमएफ ने भारत का वृद्धि दर अनुमान बढ़ाया, बनी रहेगी सबसे तेज अर्थव्यवस्था
articles.summary: IMF raised India's FY26 GDP growth estimate to 7.3% from 6.6%, a 0.7 percentage point increase. FY27 and FY28 growth projected at 6.4% each. India to remain world's fastest growing major economy for at least two years. Global GDP growth expected at 3.3% in 2026.

articles.headline: India to join upper-middle income countries by 2030 with $4,000 per capita income
articles.headline_hindi: 2030 तक उच्च-मध्य आय वाले देशों में शामिल हो जाएगा भारत
articles.summary: SBI Research report says India's per capita income could reach $4,000 by 2030, entering upper-middle income category. India crossed $1,000 per capita in 2009, $2,000 in 2019. For Viksit Bharat 2047 target, per capita GNI needs to grow at 7.5% CAGR.

articles.headline: Sensex falls 324 points on selling in Reliance, ICICI Bank
articles.headline_hindi: टैरिफ संकट और अन्य चुनौतियों के बावजूद बड़ी कंपनियों में बिकवाली से सेंसेक्स 324 अंक लुढ़का
articles.summary: Sensex fell 324.17 points to 83,246.18 and Nifty dropped 108.85 points to 25,585.50. Reliance was the biggest loser. FII sold Rs 3,262.82 crore. DII bought Rs 3,665.69 crore. BSE SmallCap fell 1.28% and MidCap dropped 0.43%.

articles.headline: Rupee falls to 90.90 against dollar; second breach of 91 in a month
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया एक महीने में दूसरी बार 91 से नीचे
articles.summary: Rupee fell 12 paise to 90.90 against the dollar, briefly breaching 91 during intraday. This is the second time in a month rupee went below 91. Foreign exchange outflows and global trade uncertainties pressured the currency.

articles.headline: PNB reports Rs 5,100 crore profit; highest quarterly profit
articles.headline_hindi: पीएनबी को 5,100 करोड़ रुपये का फायदा
articles.summary: Punjab National Bank Q3 profit rose 13% to Rs 5,100 crore - its highest ever quarterly profit. MD Ashok Chandra targets Rs 5,000+ crore profit every quarter. NPA fell to 3.19%. Business stood at Rs 28.91 lakh crore.

articles.headline: IRFC profit rises 10.5% to Rs 1,802 crore
articles.headline_hindi: आईआरएफसी को 1,802 करोड़ का लाभ
articles.summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Q3 profit rose 10.51% to Rs 1,802 crore. Net worth grew to Rs 52,046 crore. Company achieved its Rs 60,000 crore annual sanction target in nine months.

articles.headline: Wipro accused of not giving jobs to 250+ selected candidates
articles.headline_hindi: विप्रो ने 250 से अधिक नए कर्मियों को नहीं दिया काम
articles.summary: IT employees body NITES complained to Labor Minister Mansukh Mandaviya that Wipro did not provide jobs to 250+ selected candidates months after selection through Turbo and DestinationTalent hiring programs.

articles.headline: Government approves export of 5 lakh tonnes of wheat flour
articles.headline_hindi: 5 लाख टन गेहूं के आटे को निर्यात की मंजूरी
articles.summary: Government allowed export of 5 lakh tonnes of wheat flour and related products after over 3 years of partial ban. Wheat export ban was imposed in 2022. Applications to be accepted from Jan 21 to Jan 31, with monthly rolling window until quota is exhausted.

articles.headline: Public sector banks approve Rs 52,300 crore loans for MSMEs via digital underwriting
articles.headline_hindi: सरकारी बैंकों से छोटे उद्योगों को 52,300 करोड़ के कर्ज मंजूर
articles.summary: Public sector banks approved over Rs 52,300 crore loans for 3.96 lakh MSMEs through digital credit assessment model (CAM) between April 1 and December 31, 2025. The model uses digital footprint data for underwriting.

articles.headline: Moodys: India's 7.3% GDP growth to boost insurance demand
articles.headline_hindi: चालू वित्त वर्ष में 7.3 फीसदी की जीडीपी वृद्धि से बीमा की मांग बढ़ेगी: मूडीज
articles.summary: Moody's projects India's GDP growth at 7.3% for FY26 and says strong economic expansion will boost insurance demand. Total insurance premium grew 17% to Rs 10.9 lakh crore in Apr-Nov. Health insurance premium up 14%, life insurance new business premium up 20%.

articles.headline: UCO Bank profit rises 15.76% to Rs 739 crore
articles.headline_hindi: यूको बैंक को 739 करोड़ का फायदा
articles.summary: UCO Bank Q3 profit rose 15.76% to Rs 739.51 crore. Income grew to Rs 7,521 crore. Gross NPA improved to 2.41% and Net NPA fell to 0.36%. Total business crossed Rs 5.53 lakh crore.

articles.headline: First Global Economic Cooperation summit to be held Feb 17-19 in Mumbai
articles.headline_hindi: पहला ग्लोबल इकनॉमिक कोऑपरेशन 17 फरवरी से
articles.summary: The first Global Economic Cooperation summit will be held February 17-19 in Mumbai, organized by Future Economic Cooperation Council. Policymakers, global CEOs and investors will discuss economic diplomacy and capital coordination.

articles.headline: Silver surges Rs 84,000 in 2026; gold up Rs 15,500
articles.headline_hindi: रिकॉर्ड तेजी के बीच इस साल 84,000 रुपये बढ़ गई चांदी की कीमत
articles.summary: Silver surged Rs 20,400 in a single day to Rs 3,23,000 per kg, up Rs 84,000 or 35.14% in 2026. Gold jumped Rs 5,100 to record Rs 1,53,200 per 10g. Internationally, gold crossed $4,700/oz for first time. Silver hit $95.88/oz. MCX gold futures also topped Rs 1.50 lakh.

articles.headline: Sensex crashes 1,066 points to 3-month low on trade war fears
articles.headline_hindi: दुनियाभर में व्यापार युद्ध की चिंता फिर बढ़ने और चौतरफ बिकवाली के दबाव से सहमा बाजार
articles.summary: Sensex crashed 1,065.71 points to 82,180.47, a 3-month low. Nifty fell 353 points to 25,232.50. Market cap eroded by Rs 12.01 lakh crore. FII sold Rs 2,938.33 crore. 29 of 30 Sensex stocks fell. Realty index fell most at 5.21%. All sectoral indices closed in red.

articles.headline: Rupee hits record low of 90.97 against dollar
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया रिकॉर्ड निचले स्तर पर, 7 पैसे टूटा
articles.summary: Rupee fell 7 paise to an all-time low of 90.97 against the dollar. FII outflows, metal importers' dollar demand, and global trade war concerns pressured the currency. Rupee briefly touched 91.06 intraday.

articles.headline: Core sector growth rises to 4-month high of 3.7% in December
articles.headline_hindi: बुनियादी उद्योगों की वृद्धि दर चार महीने के सर्वोच्च स्तर पर
articles.summary: Eight core industries grew 3.7% in December 2025, a 4-month high, driven by fertilizer (4.1%) and cement (13.5%) output. However, this was below December 2024's 5.1%. April-December growth was 2.6% vs 4.5% in the same period last year.

articles.headline: Sugar production up 22% as mills get higher cane supply
articles.headline_hindi: गन्ने की अधिक आपूर्ति से चीनी उत्पादन 22 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: India's sugar production rose 22% to 1.59 crore tonnes by January 15 in the 2025-26 season. Maharashtra led with 51% growth. 518 mills were operational. ISMA demanded MSP revision as sugar prices fell to Rs 3,550/quintal, below production cost.

articles.headline: Lamborghini sells 111 vehicles in India in 2025
articles.summary: Lamborghini sold 111 units in India in 2025, slightly down from 113 in 2024. Global sales were 10,747 units. Super SUV segment saw 17% growth. 800 Lamborghini cars are on Indian roads.

articles.headline: SRF reports Rs 432.66 crore profit; declares Rs 5 dividend
articles.headline_hindi: एसआरएफ देगी पांच रुपये का लाभांश
articles.summary: SRF Ltd Q3 profit jumped 59.6% to Rs 432.66 crore. Revenue rose to Rs 3,712 crore. Expenses increased to Rs 3,215 crore. Board declared Rs 5 per share as second interim dividend.

articles.headline: Manufacturing PMI at quarterly high; 91% companies report stable/higher output
articles.headline_hindi: विनिर्माण सूचकांक तीसरी तिमाही में के उच्चतम स्तर पर
articles.summary: FICCI manufacturing survey shows the index at a quarterly high in Q3 with 91% companies reporting stable or higher output vs 87% in Q2. Average capacity utilization is around 75%. However, production costs remain elevated due to raw material prices and rupee weakness.

articles.headline: LTI Mindtree to start salary hikes from Q4
articles.headline_hindi: अब चालू तिमाही से वेतन बढ़ाने की शुरुआत करेगी एलटीआई माइंडट्री
articles.summary: LTI Mindtree will begin annual salary hike cycle from Q4 FY26. First phase covers 50% employees. Venu Lambu said hikes will be distributed across Q4 and Q1 FY27. Q3 headcount was 87,958 with 1,511 new hires. Attrition improved to 13.8%.

articles.headline: PhonePe gets SEBI approval for IPO
articles.headline_hindi: फोनपे को आईपीओ के लिए मिली मंजूरी
articles.summary: SEBI has approved PhonePe's IPO. The issue will be an Offer for Sale by existing shareholders. PhonePe dominates UPI with 45%+ market share and completed 9.8 billion transactions in December. FY25 revenue was Rs 7,115 crore.

articles.headline: 90% of employees confident about skills but only 64% satisfied with jobs
articles.headline_hindi: 90 फीसदी कर्मियों को मिल रहे तरक्की के भरपूर अवसर
articles.summary: ManpowerGroup India survey of 1,000+ employees found 95% are confident about their work ability but only 64% are satisfied with their jobs. 53% experience moderate daily stress. 90% are confident about AI adoption. Gen-Z women face highest stress at 64%.

articles.headline: India to become world's fastest growing insurance market by 2030: Swiss Re
articles.headline_hindi: दुनिया का सबसे तेजी से बढ़ने वाला बीमा बाजार होगा भारत
articles.summary: Swiss Re projects India will be the world's fastest growing insurance market from 2026 to 2030, driven by strong economic fundamentals, rising demand and regulatory changes. 100% FDI allowed in insurance sector. Health and vehicle insurance segments expected to grow strongly.

articles.headline: RBI report: Only 35% policyholders keep life insurance till maturity; 7.5% payout for death claims
articles.headline_hindi: आरबीआई की रिपोर्ट: सिर्फ 35 फीसदी पॉलिसीधारक मैच्योरिटी तक बनाए रखते हैं बीमा पॉलिसी
articles.summary: RBI's Financial Stability Report reveals only 35% of policyholders keep life insurance till maturity. 37% of total payouts were for pre-maturity surrenders. Death claims accounted for only 7.5% of payouts. Total life insurance payouts rose from Rs 4 lakh crore in FY21 to Rs 6.3 lakh crore in FY25.

articles.headline: Honda recalls some CBR 650R motorcycles over wiring defect
articles.headline_hindi: होंडा कुछ दोपहिया को बुलाएगी वापस
articles.summary: Honda Motorcycle & Scooter India will recall some CBR 650R units manufactured between December 16, 2024 and May 4, 2025 due to a turn signal wiring issue that could cause short circuit and light failures.

articles.headline: MSME quality certification fee exemption to be extended by 3 years
articles.headline_hindi: एमएसएमई: गुणवत्ता प्रमाणन शुल्क में छूट की बढ़ेगी सीमा
articles.summary: Government plans to extend quality certification fee exemption for MSMEs by 3 years. Micro enterprises to get 80% discount, small enterprises 50%, and medium 20% on BIS certification. BIS has published 23,000+ standards, 95% aligned with international standards.

articles.headline: Gold nears Rs 1.60 lakh, up Rs 6,500 in a day; silver also at new peak
articles.headline_hindi: सोना 1.60 लाख के करीब...6,500 रुपये बढ़े दाम, चांदी भी नए शिखर पर
articles.summary: Gold surged Rs 6,500 to reach Rs 1,59,700 per 10g all-time high in Delhi bullion market amid safe-haven demand due to global uncertainties. Silver rose Rs 11,300 to Rs 3,34,300 per kg, marking 9th consecutive session of record rally.

articles.headline: Rupee falls to record low of 91.65, biggest single-day drop in two months
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया रिकॉर्ड निचले स्तर पर...68 पैसे टूटकर 91.65 पर बंद
articles.summary: Indian rupee fell 68 paise to record low of 91.65 against US dollar, the biggest single-day fall since November 21, 2025. Greenland dispute, tariff threats and FII outflows pressured the currency. Experts warn rupee could touch 93 level.

articles.headline: Sensex plunges 1,056 points intraday before recovering, closes 271 points lower
articles.headline_hindi: सेंसेक्स दिन में 1,056 अंक लुढ़का, अंत में सुधरकर 82,000 से नीचे बंद
articles.summary: Sensex fell 270.84 points to close at 81,909.63 after plunging 1,056 points intraday amid global tensions, weak cues and continuous FII selling. Nifty lost 75 points. 18 of 30 Sensex stocks declined. Listed companies' market cap fell Rs 1.73 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Deepinder Goyal resigns as Eternal CEO, Albinder Dhindsa to take over
articles.headline_hindi: दीपेंदर गोयल ने पद से दिया इस्तीफा, अब ढींडसा होंगे इटरनल के सीईओ
articles.summary: Deepinder Goyal resigned as MD and Group CEO of Eternal (parent of Zomato and Blinkit) to pursue new ideas. Albinder Dhindsa will take over as CEO of Blinkit. Goyal will become Vice Chairman and Director for five years pending shareholder approval.

articles.headline: Eternal Q3 profit rises 73% to Rs 102 crore
articles.headline_hindi: मुनाफा 73 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: Eternal's Q3 FY2025-26 net profit rose 72.88% to Rs 102 crore. Operating revenue increased from Rs 5,405 crore to Rs 16,315 crore. Total expenditure also rose from Rs 5,533 crore to Rs 16,493 crore.

articles.headline: Bank of India posts Rs 2,705 crore profit in Q3
articles.headline_hindi: बैंक ऑफ इंडिया को 2,705 करोड़ का लाभ
articles.summary: Bank of India reported Q3 profit of Rs 2,705 crore, up 7.5% YoY. Total income rose from Rs 19,957 crore to Rs 21,205 crore. Gross NPA improved from 3.69% to 2.26%.

articles.headline: Dr Reddy's Lab Q3 profit falls 14% on weak US sales
articles.headline_hindi: डॉ. रेड्डीज लैब का लाभ 14 फीसदी घटा
articles.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories Q3 profit fell 14% to Rs 1,210 crore due to lower sales in North America. Revenue rose to Rs 8,727 crore. North America revenue fell 12% to Rs 2,964 crore while domestic sales grew 19% to Rs 1,603 crore.

articles.headline: RBI bulletin: India's GDP position inspires hope, reforms will boost infrastructure
articles.headline_hindi: भविष्य के लिए उम्मीद जगाती है जीडीपी की मौजूदा स्थिति
articles.summary: RBI January bulletin states India's current economic position inspires optimism despite global risks. GDP growth estimate for FY26 shows India remaining fastest-growing major economy. Total financial resources flow to commercial sector reached Rs 30.8 lakh crore in Apr-Dec 2025. FDI inflows showed annual improvement.

articles.headline: India's fertilizer import set to hit record $18 billion this fiscal year
articles.headline_hindi: चालू वित्त वर्ष में रिकॉर्ड 18 अरब डॉलर पहुंचेगा उर्वरक आयात
articles.summary: India's fertilizer imports could reach record $18 billion in FY2025-26, up 76% from previous year. Good monsoon rains boosted sowing to 6.52 crore hectares. Urea imports may rise 61% and DAP imports 52%. First 9 months import bill was $13.98 billion.

articles.headline: India's crude oil import bill falls 8.5% in December on softer prices
articles.headline_hindi: क्रूड में नरमी से 8.5 फीसदी घट गया भारत का तेल आयात बिल
articles.summary: India's crude oil import bill fell 8.5% YoY in December 2025 despite higher volume purchases. The decline came from softer global crude prices. India imports over 80% of its crude requirements.

articles.headline: NCLT extends protection for IL&FS directors appointed by government
articles.headline_hindi: आईएलएंडएफएस के निदेशकों को संरक्षण
articles.summary: NCLT extended protection period for professional directors of IL&FS new board against intentional defaulter designation by banks. Government had appointed the board on October 1, 2018.

articles.headline: Rural workers' retail inflation rises in December
articles.headline_hindi: ग्रामीण श्रमिकों के लिए खुदरा महंगाई बढ़ी
articles.summary: December retail inflation for agricultural and rural workers rose 0.04% and 0.11% respectively compared to November. Food inflation was -1.80% for farm workers and -1.73% for rural workers.

articles.headline: BHIM UPI app introduces auto top-up feature for low balance
articles.headline_hindi: रकम कम होने पर बैंक खाते से खुद रिचार्ज हो जाएगा यूपीआई
articles.summary: NPCI's BHIM app introduced auto top-up feature - when UPI balance drops below Rs 200, it auto-recharges. BHIM app monthly transactions grew from 3.89 crore to 16.5 crore in December. NPCI MD Lalita Nagaraj announced partnerships with Canara Bank and plans for more PSU banks.

articles.headline: Tata Motors launches 17 next-gen trucks
articles.headline_hindi: टाटा मोटर्स ने 17 ट्रकों को किया लॉन्च
articles.summary: Tata Motors launched 17 trucks with capacity of 7 to 55 tonnes as part of next-generation portfolio including Acura series, Tata Trucks EV range, and upgrades to Prima, Signa and Ultra platforms.

articles.headline: Discom losses to reduce with cost-reflective tariff provision in electricity amendment bill
articles.headline_hindi: डिस्कॉम का घाटा होगा कम, बजट में विद्युत संशोधन विधेयक पर चर्चा
articles.summary: Government plans to introduce cost-reflective tariff concept in Electricity Amendment Bill to reduce distribution company losses. Minister Manohar Lal said BTOC discoms' complaints will be addressed first. Bill expected to be discussed in budget session.

articles.headline: Budget 2026 to focus on aggressive reforms, infrastructure spending and exports
articles.headline_hindi: टैरिफ संकट के बीच अवसंरचना की रफ्तार, निर्यात और रोजगार बढ़ाने वाला होगा बजट
articles.summary: Economist Sandeep Vempati expects Union Budget 2026-27 to focus on ease of business, exports, employment, manufacturing and infrastructure. Budget size expected to be Rs 55-56 lakh crore. Capital expenditure may rise to Rs 12.25-12.5 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Pesticide industry demands stricter e-commerce rules for crop protection products
articles.headline_hindi: फसल सुरक्षा उत्पाद बेचने वाले ई-कॉमर्स के लिए सख्त हों नियम
articles.summary: CropLife India demanded stricter regulations for online sale of crop protection products. They want provisions in the Pesticide Management Bill to regulate e-commerce platforms selling agricultural inputs.

articles.headline: Indians spent 1.23 lakh crore hours on apps in 2025; India leads global downloads
articles.headline_hindi: भारतीयों ने एप्स पर एक साल में बिताए 1.23 लाख करोड़ घंटे
articles.summary: India led global app downloads with 25.5 billion downloads in 2025 per Sensor Tower report. Indians spent 1.23 lakh crore hours on apps. Gen AI app downloads tripled to 60.2 crore. ChatGPT was most downloaded Gen AI app. Microdrama apps overtook OTT platforms.

articles.headline: Walmart, Tiger Global to sell Rs 10,000 crore stake in PhonePe IPO
articles.headline_hindi: फोनपे में 10,000 करोड़ का हिस्सा बेचेंगे वॉलमार्ट और टाइगर ग्लोबल
articles.summary: PhonePe's upcoming IPO will be entirely an offer for sale worth Rs 10,115 crore. Walmart (71.77% stake), Tiger Global and Microsoft Global will sell shares. Company valuation could reach $15 billion. PhonePe holds 45%+ UPI market share.

articles.headline: IndiGo Q3 profit plunges 78% to Rs 549 crore on flight disruptions and new labor code
articles.headline_hindi: इंडिगो के मुनाफे में 78 फीसदी की गिरावट
articles.summary: IndiGo's Q3 net profit fell 78% to Rs 549 crore from Rs 2,449 crore YoY due to flight disruptions (Rs 577 crore loss) and new labor code implementation (Rs 969 crore cost). Total exceptional losses were Rs 1,546.5 crore.

articles.headline: Government may double infra spending to Rs 3 lakh crore in Budget
articles.headline_hindi: इन्फ्रा खर्च को दोगुना कर सकती है सरकार
articles.summary: Government could double infrastructure spending to Rs 3 lakh crore in Budget 2026-27. Focus on highways, urban transport and smart cities. Logistics Sector Skill Council CEO Ravikant Yarthiesh said India needs to invest in modern warehousing, cold-chain facilities and retail logistics.

articles.headline: Air India may face record Rs 15,000 crore loss due to Ahmedabad crash and Pakistan airspace closure
articles.headline_hindi: हादसे से एअर इंडिया को होगा रिकॉर्ड 15,000 करोड़ का घाटा
articles.summary: Air India expected to post minimum Rs 15,000 crore loss for FY2025-26 due to Ahmedabad crash and Pakistan airspace closure forcing longer Europe/US routes. ICRA estimates aviation industry may face Rs 170-180 billion net loss. Air India has accumulated Rs 32,210 crore losses in past three years.

articles.headline: Gold falls Rs 2,500 as Trump's softer stance triggers profit booking; silver drops Rs 14,300
articles.headline_hindi: तेजी का दौर थमा...चांदी रिकॉर्ड ऊंचाई से 14,300 रुपये सस्ती
articles.summary: Gold fell Rs 2,500 to Rs 1,57,200 per 10g and silver plunged Rs 14,300 to Rs 3,20,000 per kg as Trump's softer stance on European tariffs and Greenland reduced safe-haven demand. Internationally gold fell to $4,822.65 per ounce.

articles.headline: Markets recover from 3-session fall, Rs 4.42 lakh crore added to market cap
articles.headline_hindi: बाजार तीन सत्रों की गिरावट से उबरा, 4.42 लाख करोड़ बढ़ी पूंजी
articles.summary: Sensex rose 397.74 points to 82,307.37 recovering from three consecutive sessions of decline. Nifty gained 132.40 points. Market cap of listed companies rose Rs 4.42 lakh crore to Rs 458.52 lakh crore. 24 of 30 Sensex stocks gained.

articles.headline: EU suspends preferential trade benefits for India; 87% exports to face higher duties
articles.headline_hindi: ईयू ने तरजीही योजना के निर्यात लाभों को किया खत्म
articles.summary: EU suspended GSP preferential benefits for India from January 1, affecting 87% of exports by value. Indian exporters will now pay full 12% tariff instead of 9.6%. This comes as both sides are close to finalizing an FTA. EU accounts for 17% of India's total exports at $75.85 billion.

articles.headline: Postal Department targets 30% revenue growth this fiscal
articles.headline_hindi: डाक विभाग का राजस्व 30 फीसदी बढ़ने की आस
articles.summary: Department of Posts targets 30% revenue growth to Rs 17,546 crore in FY2025-26. Five of six departments showed revenue growth. Previous year total revenue was Rs 13,240 crore. Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia announced the target.

articles.headline: Indian Bank posts Rs 3,061 crore Q3 profit, up 7.33%
articles.headline_hindi: इंडियन बैंक को 3,061 करोड़ रुपये का फायदा
articles.summary: Indian Bank reported Q3 profit of Rs 3,061 crore, up 7.33% YoY. Net interest income grew 7.50% to Rs 6,896 crore. Total income reached Rs 19,663 crore. Gross NPA fell to 2.23%. Deposits grew 12.62% to Rs 7.91 lakh crore.

articles.headline: Deepinder Goyal to return Rs 1,000 crore worth of Eternal shares
articles.headline_hindi: 1,000 करोड़ रुपये के शेयर वापस करेंगे दीपेंदर गोयल
articles.summary: Deepinder Goyal will return 3.3 crore Eternal shares worth Rs 1,000 crore to the company. This eliminates near-term dilution risk for shareholders. Eternal stock fell 2.61% to Rs 276 after the announcement.

articles.headline: Startups urge government not to use Supreme Court tax ruling for scrutinizing old investments
articles.headline_hindi: कर चोरी पर शीर्ष कोर्ट के फैसले का उपयोग पुराने निवेशों की जांच में न करे सरकार
articles.summary: 60 startups appealed to government not to use Supreme Court's Mauritius tax ruling to investigate pre-2017 investments. The court had found Carlisle and Advent involved in tax evasion via Flipkart deal. Tiger Global denied wrongdoing. Startup Policy Forum CEO warned of negative impact on FDI.

articles.headline: Top-8 cities see 12% decline in housing sales, but prices remain stable
articles.headline_hindi: शीर्ष-8 शहरों में 12 फीसदी घटी मकानों की बिक्री, पर कीमतें स्थिर
articles.summary: Residential sales in top-8 Indian cities fell 12% to 3,86,365 units in 2025 from 4,36,992 in 2024. However, South Indian cities Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Chennai saw 15% growth to over 1.33 lakh units. Prices remained stable despite lower sales.

articles.headline: Electricity distribution network crosses 5 lakh circuit km milestone
articles.headline_hindi: विद्युत वितरण नेटवर्क पांच लाख सर्किट किमी
articles.summary: India's electricity distribution network crossed the 5 lakh circuit km milestone with 220 kV and above high-voltage capacity and 1,407 GVA transformation capacity. Rajasthan's Bhadla to Sikar 765 kV, 628 circuit km transmission line was commissioned for renewable energy evacuation.

articles.headline: Razorpay POS gets RBI license as offline payment aggregator
articles.headline_hindi: रेजरपे पीओएस को एग्रीगेटर का लाइसेंस
articles.summary: Razorpay POS received RBI license as offline payment aggregator. The company now holds all three major RBI licenses: online payment aggregator, cross-border payment aggregator, and offline payment aggregator.

articles.headline: SEBI charges PwC and EY with insider trading in Yes Bank share sale case
articles.headline_hindi: यस बैंक शेयर बिक्री में पीडब्ल्यूसी-ईवाई पर इनसाइडर ट्रेडिंग का आरोप
articles.summary: SEBI charged PwC, EY, Carlisle and Advent officials with insider trading in Yes Bank's 2022 share offering. 19 people including senior officials face charges. Advisors allegedly shared unpublished price-sensitive information. SEBI asked EY chairman Rajiv Memani to explain why penalties shouldn't be imposed.

articles.headline: Sensex falls 770 points as FII selling continues despite global rally
articles.headline_hindi: बिकवाली के दबाव से 770 अंक टूटा सेंसेक्स, 82,000 से नीचे
articles.summary: Sensex plunged 769.67 points to 81,537.70 despite positive global markets. Nifty fell 241.25 points to 25,048.65. FIIs sold Rs 4,113 crore worth of shares. Market cap of listed companies dropped Rs 6.95 lakh crore to Rs 451.56 lakh crore. All sectoral indices declined.

articles.headline: Forex reserves jump $14 billion to cross $701 billion
articles.headline_hindi: फॉरेक्स 14 अरब डॉलर बढ़ा, 701 अरब डॉलर पार
articles.summary: India's foreign exchange reserves surged $14.16 billion to $701.36 billion in the week ending January 16. Foreign currency assets rose $9.65 billion to $560.51 billion. Gold reserves increased $4.62 billion. Previous record was $704.89 billion in September 2024.

articles.headline: RBI to inject over Rs 2 lakh crore liquidity into banking system
articles.headline_hindi: बैंकों में दो लाख करोड़ की नकदी डालेगा आरबीआई
articles.summary: RBI announced injection of over Rs 2 lakh crore into banking system through OMO bond purchases of Rs 1 lakh crore (Rs 50,000 crore each on Feb 5 and 12) after reviewing current liquidity and financial conditions.

articles.headline: Amazon to begin second round of layoffs next week, 16,000 jobs at risk
articles.headline_hindi: अमेजन अगले हफ्ते से फिर करेगी छंटनी, 16,000 नौकरियों पर संकट
articles.summary: Amazon preparing second round of layoffs affecting 16,000 employees starting next week. Under 30,000 layoff target, 14,000 were let go in October. AWS, retail, Prime Video and People Experience divisions will be affected. Amazon India head Amit Agrawal said company wants to work like a startup with fewer resources.

articles.headline: Silver surges Rs 9,500 in one day; gold up Rs 1,500
articles.headline_hindi: चांदी एक दिन में 9,500 रुपये महंगी, सोना भी 1,500 चमका
articles.summary: Silver jumped Rs 9,500 to Rs 3,29,500 per kg on fresh stockist buying and strong global cues. Gold rose Rs 1,500 to Rs 1,58,700 per 10g. Internationally gold crossed $4,900 per ounce and silver touched $99.78 per ounce record.

articles.headline: Rupee hits record low of 92, falls over 2% this month
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया रिकॉर्ड निचले स्तर पर, इस माह 2% से अधिक गिरावट
articles.summary: Rupee touched 92 for the first time against USD during intraday trading before closing at 91.90, down 32 paise. The currency has fallen over 2% or 202 paise this month. Mirae Asset analyst warned of further pressure from imports and FII outflows.

articles.headline: Adani Enterprise profit plunges 99% to Rs 5 crore
articles.headline_hindi: अदाणी एंटरप्राइजेज का लाभ 99 फीसदी घटा
articles.summary: Adani Enterprises Q3 profit fell 98.94% to Rs 5 crore from Rs 474 crore YoY. Total expenses surged from Rs 2,329 crore to Rs 2,961 crore. Cost rose Rs 1,251 crore to Rs 1,698 crore. Total income grew to Rs 2,837 crore from Rs 2,636 crore.

articles.headline: Adani stocks crash up to 14.6% after US SEC summons
articles.headline_hindi: अमेरिकी नियामक की कार्रवाई से अदाणी के शेयर 14.6% तक टूटे
articles.summary: Adani group stocks crashed up to 14.63% after US SEC sent direct email summons to Gautam Adani and Adani Green executive Sagar Adani in bribery-fraud case. Adani Green fell 14.63%, Adani Enterprises 10.76%, Adani Ports 7.52%. Total group market cap fell Rs 1.40 lakh crore.

articles.headline: General Atlantic to acquire 7% stake in Balaji Wafers for Rs 2,000 crore+
articles.headline_hindi: जनरल अटलांटिक लेगी बालाजी वेफर्स में हिस्सा
articles.summary: Private equity firm General Atlantic plans to acquire 7% stake in Balaji Wafers for over Rs 2,000 crore, valuing the company at Rs 35,000 crore. The company has signed a strategic investment agreement.

articles.headline: Indian Oil shifts away from Russian crude, buys from Brazil and Angola
articles.headline_hindi: इंडियन ऑयल ने रूस से बनाई दूरी...ब्राजील व अंगोला से खरीद रही तेल
articles.summary: Indian Oil Corporation bought 70 lakh barrels from non-Russian sources including Petrobras (Brazil), Shell (Abu Dhabi Murban grade), and Exxon (Angola). This strategic shift aims to help India negotiate lower tariffs with the US. Russia's share of India's crude imports hit 2-year low in December.

articles.headline: IndusInd Bank profit crashes 90% in Q3
articles.headline_hindi: इंडसइंड बैंक के मुनाफे में 90 फीसदी गिरावट
articles.summary: IndusInd Bank's Q3 profit plunged 90% to Rs 127.98 crore due to rising micro-finance stress and loan growth reduction under new management. Bank started process to right-size its balance sheet including reducing expensive deposit liabilities.

articles.headline: India's FDI surges 73% in 2025 driven by services and manufacturing
articles.headline_hindi: प्रत्यक्ष विदेशी निवेश 73 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: India's FDI grew 73% in 2025 to $47 billion, mainly driven by services and manufacturing sectors per UNCTAD data. Global FDI also rose. China's FDI declined for the third consecutive year. France topped global FDI recipients.

articles.headline: India-EU FTA will strengthen India's position in global markets amid tariff crisis
articles.headline_hindi: टैरिफ संकट के बीच भारत-यूरोपीय संघ के बीच एफटीए के फायदे
articles.summary: India and EU are close to finalizing a long-pending FTA expected to be announced at India-EU Summit. The agreement will boost textile and jewelry exports. India has signed 9 trade agreements in 4 years. EU bilateral trade was $136.53 billion in 2024-25.

articles.headline: Five companies to invest Rs 863 crore under AC components PLI scheme
articles.headline_hindi: पीएलआई : एसी कलपुर्जा बनाने वाली पांच कंपनियां करेंगी 863 करोड़ रुपये का निवेश
articles.summary: Five companies selected under PLI scheme for AC components will invest Rs 863 crore. Total production target is Rs 8,337 crore with 1,799 additional direct jobs by FY2027-28. The scheme offers 4-6% incentive on sales growth.

articles.headline: Zoho launches AI-native ERP platform for Indian businesses
articles.headline_hindi: भारतीय व्यवसायों को वैश्विक मंच देगा जोहो का एआई ईआरपी प्लेटफॉर्म
articles.summary: Zoho launched Made-in-India AI-native Enterprise Resource Planning platform from Kumbakonam. Co-founder Dr. Sridhar Vembu said the platform integrates financial management, billing, supply chain, payroll and asset management. AI features include voice-based invoicing and fraud detection.

articles.headline: Government releases discussion paper on new GDP series with 2022-23 base year
articles.headline_hindi: जीडीपी की नई शृंखला पर चर्चा पत्र जारी
articles.summary: Ministry of Statistics released discussion paper on new GDP quarterly series and sub-national accounts computation. The new national accounts series will have FY2022-23 as base year.

articles.headline: Budget 2026: Where's the opportunity, where's the risk for investors
articles.headline_hindi: बजट 2026 : कहां मौका, कहां धोखा?
articles.summary: Pre-budget investment advisory article. Experts advise cautious stock picking over aggressive buying. Key sectors to watch: defense, infrastructure, FMCG, energy. PSU banks returned 27%, auto 21%, metals 21% in 2025. SIP strategy should be adjusted for 2026 risks.

articles.headline: EPF withdrawal now possible via UPI from April 2026
articles.headline_hindi: EPF निकासी अब चुटकियों में!
articles.summary: EPFO members will be able to withdraw provident fund directly via UPI from April 2026. Rs 25,000 per transaction limit set. BHIM app will enable direct connection. 75% of total balance can be withdrawn; 25% remains as minimum balance. Education withdrawals increased to 10 times.

articles.headline: NPS Vatsalya: Building pension fund for children
articles.headline_hindi: NPS वात्सल्य: बच्चों के भविष्य का पेंशन फंड
articles.summary: NPS Vatsalya scheme launched September 18, 2024 allows parents to start pension savings for children under 18. Minimum Rs 250 annual contribution with no upper limit. 25% withdrawal allowed after 3 years for education/medical needs. At 18, converts to regular NPS.

articles.headline: UTI Gold ETF: 100% returns in one year, 1,251% since launch
articles.headline_hindi: Gold ETF: शुद्धता की गारंटी, मुनाफे की चांदी
articles.summary: UTI Gold ETF delivered 100% returns in one year and 202.97% in five years. Since launch in April 2007, it returned 1,251.05%. AUM reached Rs 3,282.12 crore. The ETF tracks 999 purity gold prices without making charges.

articles.headline: RBI launches unified ombudsman scheme 2026 for faster complaint resolution
articles.headline_hindi: बैंक ग्राहकों की शिकायतों का होगा तुरंत समाधान
articles.summary: RBI issued Integrated Ombudsman Scheme 2026 effective July 2026 for faster resolution of banking customer complaints. No limit on dispute amount. RBI ombudsman can award up to Rs 30 lakh compensation and Rs 3 lakh for harassment/time wastage.

articles.headline: SMA credit alert: What it means when your account is flagged
articles.headline_hindi: मेरी क्रेडिट रिपोर्ट में SMA लिखा है, इसका क्या मतलब है?
articles.summary: Explainer on Special Mention Account (SMA) classification in banking. SMA-0 (1-30 day overdue) is first warning, SMA-1 (31-60 days) puts you on bank watchlist, SMA-2 (61-90 days) is red alert before NPA classification.

articles.headline: How to build a risk-based mutual fund portfolio for 2026
articles.headline_hindi: जोखिम के हिसाब से बनाएं म्‍यूचुअल फंड निवेश की योजना
articles.summary: Investment advisory on building SIP portfolios based on risk profiles for 2026. Conservative: 50% large-cap, 30% hybrid, 10% index, 10% gold ETF. Balanced: 40% large-cap/index, 30% flexi-cap, 20% mid-cap, 10% multi-asset. Aggressive: 25% small-cap, 50% mid-cap, 25% large-cap.

articles.headline: Record: Silver surges Rs 40,500 in one day; gold at Rs 1.66 lakh peak
articles.headline_hindi: रिकॉर्ड : चांदी एक दिन में 40,500 रुपये महंगी, सोना भी 1.66 लाख के शीर्ष पर
articles.summary: Silver surged an unprecedented Rs 40,500 in a single day to Rs 3.70 lakh per kg record. Gold jumped Rs 7,300 to Rs 1,66,000 per 10g all-time high. Internationally silver soared 8.24% to $112.41/oz. Gold touched $5,087.48/oz. Silver gained Rs 1.33 lakh per kg this month alone.

articles.headline: Banking strike disrupts Rs 4 lakh crore cheque clearance
articles.headline_hindi: बैंकिंग हड़ताल से 4 लाख करोड़ के चेक क्लियरेंस में अटके
articles.summary: UFBYU banking strike on January 23 disrupted branch banking services across India. Rs 4 lakh crore in cheques were stuck in clearance. 8 lakh employees from nine unions participated demanding 5-day work week. Meeting with Chief Labor Commissioner failed.

articles.headline: Rupee recovers 22 paise from record low, closes at 91.68
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया रिकॉर्ड निचले स्तर से 22 पैसे उछला
articles.summary: Rupee recovered 22 paise from record low to close at 91.68, supported by weak US dollar index and India-EU FTA optimism. However, gains were limited by crude oil price rise.

articles.headline: Asian Paints Q3 profit falls 4% to Rs 1,074 crore on new labor code costs
articles.headline_hindi: एशियन पेंट्स का लाभ घटकर 1,128 करोड़
articles.summary: Asian Paints Q3 profit fell 4% to Rs 1,073.92 crore due to new labor code costs including Rs 157.61 crore gratuity increase and Rs 93.87 crore White Teak acquisition expenses. Revenue rose 3.71% to Rs 8,867 crore.

articles.headline: Tata Consumer Products Q3 profit rises 36.4%
articles.headline_hindi: टाटा कंज्यूमर का फायदा 36 फीसदी बढ़ा
articles.summary: Tata Consumer Products Q3 profit rose 36.4% to Rs 384.52 crore. Revenue increased 15% to Rs 5,112 crore. Total expenditure was Rs 4,582.24 crore, up 12.11%.

articles.headline: Marico Q3 profit up 13.3% to Rs 460 crore
articles.headline_hindi: मैरिको को 460 करोड़ रुपये का फायदा
articles.summary: Marico Ltd Q3 profit rose 13.3% to Rs 460 crore. Revenue grew 26.6% to Rs 3,537 crore. Expenditure increased 29.8% to Rs 3,009 crore.

articles.headline: India needs $145 billion annual investment in energy sector for net-zero goals
articles.headline_hindi: ऊर्जा क्षेत्र में भारत को सालाना 145 अरब डॉलर निवेश जुटाने की जरूरत
articles.summary: Wood Mackenzie VP Joshua Ngu said India needs $145 billion annual energy investment to bridge gap between economic growth and carbon emission reduction. Focus should be on power generation, energy storage and grid modernization.

articles.headline: Government targets 3-nanometer chip manufacturing by 2032
articles.headline_hindi: 2032 तक तीन नैनोमीटर चिप्स निर्माण का लक्ष्य
articles.summary: IT Minister Ashwini Vaishnav announced India's target to manufacture 3nm chips by 2032 under Design Linked Incentive scheme Phase 2, focusing on six categories: compute, radio frequency, networking, power, sensor and memory chips.

articles.headline: Adani-Embraer partnership to build passenger aircraft in India
articles.headline_hindi: अदाणी-एम्ब्रेयर के बीच करार, साझेदारी से विमान निर्माण का हब बनेगा भारत
articles.summary: Adani Group and Brazilian aircraft maker Embraer signed MoU to manufacture passenger aircraft in India. Partnership covers aircraft assembly, supply chain, MRO, sales and pilot training. India's domestic aviation market is world's third largest with need for 2,000 aircraft in next 20 years.

articles.headline: Markets rise on India-EU FTA optimism; market cap up Rs 2.11 lakh crore
articles.headline_hindi: एफटीए पर सहमति से बाजार में तेजी, 2.11 लाख करोड़ बढ़ी पूंजी
articles.summary: Sensex rose 319.78 points to 81,857.48 and Nifty gained 126.75 points on India-EU FTA agreement optimism. Banking and metal stocks saw heavy buying. Market cap of listed companies rose Rs 2.11 lakh crore. 17 of 30 Sensex stocks gained with Adani Ports up 4.19%.

articles.headline: Budget 2026: Aggressive reforms focus on defense, health, education, women empowerment
articles.headline_hindi: टैरिफ जंग के बीच आक्रामक आर्थिक नीति पर जोर
articles.summary: Pre-budget analysis: FM Sitharaman to present record 9th budget focusing on reforms. Health budget may cross Rs 1.25 lakh crore. Education budget could reach Rs 1.50 lakh crore. Defense budget expected to see 20% increase. India Development & Strategic Fund for green energy and MSMEs. FDI rose 73% to $47 billion.

articles.headline: Markets rally for second straight day; Sensex up 487 points, Rs 5.85 lakh crore added
articles.headline_hindi: बाजार लगातार दूसरे सत्र बढ़त में...सेंसेक्स 487 अंक उछला
articles.summary: Sensex surged 487.20 points to 82,344.68 crossing 82,000. Nifty gained 167.35 points to 25,342.75. Market cap rose Rs 5.85 lakh crore to Rs 459.53 lakh crore. BEL rose 8.90%, Eternal 5.09%. FIIs sold Rs 480 crore while DIIs bought Rs 3,361 crore.

articles.headline: Industrial production hits 2-year high of 7.8% growth in December
articles.headline_hindi: विनिर्माण के प्रदर्शन से औद्योगिक उत्पादन दो साल के उच्च स्तर पर
articles.summary: India's Industrial Production Index (IIP) grew 7.8% in December 2025, a two-year high, driven by mining, manufacturing and power sectors. Manufacturing grew 8.1% vs 3.7% a year ago. Mining output reached 6.8% from 2.7%. Power generation rose to 6.3%.

articles.headline: Record silver rally continues; silver up Rs 15,000, gold Rs 5,000 in a day
articles.headline_hindi: रिकॉर्ड तेजी जारी...चांदी 15,000 रुपये बढ़कर 3.85 लाख पहुंची
articles.summary: Silver surged Rs 15,000 to Rs 3,85,000 per kg, third consecutive session of gains. Gold rose Rs 5,000 to Rs 1,71,000 per 10g all-time high. Internationally gold hit $5,311.38 record and silver reached $112.22 per ounce.

articles.headline: Rupee hits fresh record low near 92 as dollar demand surges
articles.headline_hindi: रुपया सबसे निचले स्तर पर, 92 के करीब
articles.summary: Rupee fell to record low of 91.99 against dollar, touching 92 intraday for the second time in a week. Dollar demand from importers and FII outflows pressured the currency despite initial gains.

articles.headline: Economic Survey: Developed nations' protectionism signals end of globalization; Swadeshi push essential
articles.headline_hindi: विकसित देशों की मनमानी वैश्वीकरण के अंत का संकेत, स्वदेशी को आगे बढ़ाना अपरिहार्य
articles.summary: Economic Survey 2025-26 warns that export controls, technology denial and carbon tax regimes signal end of globalization. India must pursue import substitution and strategic self-reliance. Swadeshi is both a defensive and offensive policy tool. Survey calls for disciplined approach to managing external shocks.

articles.headline: Economic Survey: Poverty reduced significantly, bottom 5-10% saw highest spending growth
articles.headline_hindi: घटी गरीबी : सबसे निचले तबके के खर्चे में भारी उछाल
articles.summary: Economic Survey shows government welfare measures significantly reduced poverty. Bottom 5-10% of population saw highest per-capita monthly expenditure growth in both rural and urban areas between 2022-23 and 2023-24. Subsidies, pensions and direct benefit transfers helped the weakest sections.

articles.headline: MSME sector faces Rs 8.1 lakh crore pending payments challenge
articles.headline_hindi: एमएसएमई : 8.1 लाख करोड़ का लंबित भुगतान बड़ी चुनौती
articles.summary: Economic Survey highlights Rs 8.1 lakh crore in pending payments to MSMEs as a major barrier to growth. Need for cash-flow based lending and digital integration. Despite MSME credit growth, limited documentation and guarantees remain hurdles for micro enterprises.

articles.headline: Service exports at $387.5 billion serve as shield against tariff uncertainties
articles.headline_hindi: सेवा निर्यात : उच्च टैरिफ के बीच देश का सुरक्षा कवच
articles.summary: Economic Survey highlights service exports of $387.5 billion as India's safety net against tariff uncertainties. While goods trade slowed, services exports grew 13.6% in FY2024-25 and 6.5% in April-December. This partially offset volatility in goods exports.

articles.headline: Economic Survey: FTAs expanding India's reliable market access amid global uncertainty
articles.headline_hindi: एफटीए : टैरिफ संकट के दौर में बढ़ रहा भारत पर भरोसा
articles.summary: Economic Survey notes India's expanding FTA network strengthens trade strategy amid global uncertainties. India completed FTAs with EU, UK, Australia and others. US-India trade agreement talks are in 6th round and expected to complete this year.

articles.headline: Economic Survey: India leads global IPO market
articles.headline_hindi: आईपीओ : वैश्विक स्तर पर अग्रणी बना भारत
articles.summary: India emerged as global leader in IPOs despite uncertainties. April-December saw Rs 10.7 lakh crore raised via primary markets. Mainboard listings rose from 69 to 94, with amount increasing from Rs 1.46 to Rs 1.60 lakh crore. SME IPOs raised Rs 9,635 crore from 217 offerings. Nifty-50 grew 11.1% and Sensex 10.1%.

articles.headline: Rare earth minerals emerging as new trade barriers in global energy transition
articles.headline_hindi: रेअर अर्थ नई बाधा के रूप में उभर रहे दुर्लभ खनिज
articles.summary: Economic Survey warns that critical minerals including copper and rare earth elements are becoming strategic trade barriers. Export restrictions by supplier countries like Indonesia, Congo and Chile are creating supply crisis risks amid growing demand for EVs, data centers and solar energy.

articles.headline: Economic Survey suggests redefining public sector companies at 26% government holding
articles.headline_hindi: 26% हिस्सेदारी पर भी सरकारी मानी जाएगी कंपनी
articles.summary: Economic Survey suggests redefining public sector companies - currently at 51% government holding, the threshold could be reduced to 26%. This would allow government to sell stake below 51% while maintaining influence. It would ease privatization and boost government revenue.

articles.headline: Insurance distribution commissions remain high concern despite digitization
articles.headline_hindi: बीमा : डिजिटलीकरण के बावजूद भारी कमीशन चिंता का विषय
articles.summary: Economic Survey flags high distributor commissions on insurance products as a barrier to penetration despite digitization. Large share of policyholder premiums goes to distribution commissions, making insurance expensive. Digital-first approach needed to reduce costs.

articles.headline: 40% of gig workers earn less than Rs 15,000 per month: Economic Survey
articles.headline_hindi: गिग कर्मचारी : 40% की कमाई 15,000 रुपये से कम
articles.summary: Economic Survey reveals 40% of gig workers earn less than Rs 15,000 monthly. Survey suggests hourly/per-task minimum wages to bridge earnings gap between regular and gig employment. Gig workforce expected to reach 6.7% of total labor force by 2029-30. Over 80 crore workers use smartphones with 15 billion monthly UPI transactions.

articles.headline: Skill development: Only 4.9% of youth aged 15-29 have formal vocational training
articles.headline_hindi: कौशल विकास : स्कूल छोड़ने वालों की घटेगी संख्या, 13 फीसदी बढ़ेगा रोजगार
articles.summary: Economic Survey notes only 4.9% of 15-29 age group has formal vocational training while 21.2% got informal training. Investing in formal skill development could increase employment by 13% in labor-intensive sectors by 2030. District skill committees need strengthening.

articles.headline: Jio BlackRock launches Sector Rotation Fund with AI-driven analytics
articles.headline_hindi: एआई और सेक्टर रोटेशन के दम पर जियो ब्लैकरॉक की नई पेशकश
articles.summary: Jio BlackRock AMC launched its second active equity fund - Sector Rotation Fund closing February 9 with Nifty 500 TRI benchmark. The fund uses AI analytics to identify sector trends and rotates investments accordingly. Managed by Dweevi and Kacheriya with Sahil Chaudhary as co-manager.

articles.headline: Gold falls Rs 14,000 on heavy profit booking; silver drops below Rs 4 lakh
articles.headline_hindi: कीमतों में रिकॉर्ड तेजी थमी...सोना 14,000 रुपये सस्ता
articles.summary: Gold plunged Rs 14,000 or 7.65% to Rs 1,69,000 per 10g on heavy profit booking by institutional traders. Silver fell Rs 20,000 to Rs 3,84,500 per kg, dropping below Rs 4 lakh. Previous day silver was at record Rs 4,04,500 and gold at Rs 1,83,000.

articles.headline: Forex reserves hit all-time high of $709.4 billion, up $8 billion in a week
articles.headline_hindi: विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार आठ अरब डॉलर बढ़कर रिकॉर्ड ऊंचाई पर
articles.summary: India's forex reserves surged $8.05 billion to all-time high of $709.413 billion in week ending January 23. Foreign currency assets rose $2.367 billion to $562.88 billion. Gold reserves jumped $5.635 billion to $123.088 billion. IMF reserves rose $1.8 billion to $4.703 billion. Previous record was $704.89 billion in September 2024.

articles.headline: Sensex falls 297 points as pre-budget profit booking sets in
articles.headline_hindi: बाजार में तीन सत्रों की तेजी थमी, सेंसेक्स 297 अंक टूटा
articles.summary: Sensex fell 296.59 points to 82,269.78 as three-session rally ended on pre-budget profit booking. Nifty dropped 98.25 points. Metal index fell 5.12%. However FIIs were net buyers at Rs 2,251.37 crore while DIIs sold Rs 601 crore. Market cap still rose Rs 5,386 crore.

articles.headline: India-Chile FTA to open doors for critical minerals access
articles.headline_hindi: भारत-चिली एफटीए जल्द होगा पूरा, महत्वपूर्ण खनिज क्षेत्र के खुलेंगे रास्ते
articles.summary: Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal announced India-Chile FTA talks will be completed soon, upgrading 2006 PTA to comprehensive CEPA. Chile has vast lithium, copper, rhenium, molybdenum and cobalt reserves critical for electronics, EVs and solar. India completed 8 trade agreements in 4 years including with EU, UK, Australia.

articles.headline: Moodys: EU-India FTA will provide economic security amid tariff volatility
articles.headline_hindi: ईयू संग एफटीए से भारतीय निर्यातकों की अधिक बाजारों तक बढ़ेगी पहुंच
articles.summary: Rating agency Moody's says India-EU FTA will diversify trade relationships and help exporters access more markets amid US high tariffs. EU gets access to India's 3rd largest car market. MSME sector will benefit from new orders. However, European imports may pressure domestic manufacturers' profitability.

articles.headline: Nestle India Q3 profit rises 45% to Rs 998 crore; announces Rs 7 dividend
articles.headline_hindi: नेस्ले देगी सात रुपये लाभांश, मुनाफा बढ़ा
articles.summary: Nestle India Q3 profit rose 45.12% to Rs 998.42 crore. Revenue reached all-time high of Rs 5,667 crore. Total expenditure was Rs 4,667.63 crore. Board approved Rs 7 per share interim dividend.

articles.headline: ITC posts Rs 5,018 crore Q3 profit; revenue rises to Rs 21,707 crore
articles.headline_hindi: आईटीसी को 5,018 करोड़ रुपये का लाभ
articles.summary: ITC reported Q3 profit of Rs 5,018 crore, nearly flat YoY. Revenue rose to Rs 21,707 crore. Board recommended Rs 6.50 per share interim dividend payable between February 26-28, 2026.

articles.headline: Canara Bank gross NPA improves by 1.26% to 2.08%
articles.headline_hindi: केनरा बैंक के एनपीए में 1.26 फीसदी कमी
articles.summary: Canara Bank's gross NPA improved 1.26% to 2.08% in Q3. Domestic deposits grew 11.10% to Rs 13,97,045 crore. Global deposits also rose 12.95%. MD-CEO Hardeep Singh Ahluwalia highlighted deposit growth.

articles.headline: NSE gets SEBI green light for Rs 10,000 crore IPO after decade-long wait
articles.headline_hindi: एनएसई के 10,000 करोड़ के आईपीओ को सेबी से हरी झंडी
articles.summary: SEBI granted NOC to National Stock Exchange for its IPO after over a decade. NSE had first filed for a Rs 10,000 crore share sale in 2016 but was delayed due to governance and co-location issues. SEBI chairman recently gave in-principle approval to NSE's settlement petition.

articles.headline: Vedanta plans to list five subsidiaries by mid-May
articles.headline_hindi: वेदांता की पांच कंपनियां मई तक होंगी सूचीबद्ध
articles.summary: Vedanta Ltd plans to list its five demerged entities on stock exchanges by mid-May. CFO Ajay Goel said the company is in the final stage of planned restructuring with demerger expected to be effective from April, taking 4-6 weeks.

articles.headline: Indian Oil signs LOI with Akasa Air for sustainable aviation fuel supply
articles.headline_hindi: इंडियन ऑयल ने अकासा एयर संग किया समझौता
articles.summary: Indian Oil Corporation signed Letter of Intent with Akasa Air at Wings India-2026 to explore sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) supply possibilities. The agreement establishes a framework for cooperation to support the airline's sustainability goals.

articles.headline: Mercedes-Benz to assemble luxury Maybach in India, 2025 revenue at all-time high
articles.headline_hindi: अब भारत में लग्जरी कार मेबैक का उत्पादन करेगी मर्सिडीज
articles.summary: Mercedes-Benz announced India as first country for Maybach assembly outside Germany. 2025 sales were 19,007 units, slightly below 2024's 19,565 but revenue was best-ever. Top-end vehicles grew 25% in sales share. EV portfolio grew 12% YoY. AMG high-performance portfolio achieved 34% growth.

articles.headline: US dollar falls to four-year low amid tariff policy uncertainty
articles.headline_hindi: अमेरिकी डॉलर चार साल के निचले स्तर पर क्यों फिसला
articles.summary: US dollar fell to four-year low against euro and pound, dropping 3% in one week. Trump's 'Liberation Day' tariffs, Greenland tensions and shifting investor sentiment drove the decline. Dollar index fell 10% last year, worst since 2017.

articles.headline: SIS Ltd reports Rs 138 crore loss due to new labor code; revenue crosses Rs 4,000 crore
articles.headline_hindi: एसआईएस देगी सात रुपये प्रति शेयर लाभांश
articles.summary: SIS Ltd posted Rs 138.37 crore loss due to new labor code costs. However revenue rose 24.46% to record Rs 4,185.22 crore, crossing Rs 4,000 crore for first time. Board declared Rs 7 per share interim dividend.

articles.headline: Acme Solar Q3 profit rises 1.5%; revenue surges 53.9%
articles.headline_hindi: अक्मे सोलर का फायदा बढ़ा, देगी लाभांश
articles.summary: Acme Solar posted Q3 profit of Rs 114 crore, up 1.5% YoY. Revenue surged 53.9% to Rs 617 crore. Expenses rose to Rs 615 crore. Board recommended Rs 0.20 per share interim dividend.

articles.headline: Fiscal deficit at 54.5% of budget target by December; government revenue at Rs 25.25 lakh crore
articles.headline_hindi: राजकोषीय घाटा बजट लक्ष्य का 54.5%, कमाई 25 लाख करोड़
articles.summary: Central government fiscal deficit reached Rs 8.55 lakh crore by December 2025, or 54.5% of FY2025-26 budget target of Rs 15.69 lakh crore. Total government revenue was Rs 25.25 lakh crore. Tax revenue was Rs 19.39 lakh crore. Non-tax revenue was Rs 5.39 lakh crore. Total expenditure was Rs 25.93 lakh crore.

rupee_market_correlation.interpretation: Weak correlation between rupee moves and market
